title: Tate brothers appear in US court for extradition proceedings
english: Influencer Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan appeared in a Florida court to begin extradition proceedings to the UK. The brothers face 38 new charges, including rape and sex trafficking, which they and their legal team strongly deny. Their lawyer plans to fight the extradition, which he claims is politically motivated, with the next court date scheduled for July.
amharic: ታዋቂው ኢንፍሉዌንሰር አንድሪው ታይት እና ወንድሙ ትሪስታን ወደ እንግሊዝ እንዲዛወሩ የተጠየቀውን የፍርድ ሂደት ለመጀመር በፍሎሪዳ ፍርድ ቤት ቀርበዋል። ወንድማማቾቹ በግድ ወሲባዊ ግንኙነት እና በሰዎች የንግድ ዝውውር ወንጀል የተከሰሱ ሲሆን፣ እነርሱና ጠበቃቸው ክሱ ፈጽሞ ስህተት እንደሆነ በመግለጽ ይከራከራሉ። ጠበቃቸው ክሱ ፖለቲካዊ ተጽዕኖ ያለበት መሆኑን በመጥቀስ የኤክስትራዲሽን ሂደቱን እንደሚቃወሙ ገልጸዋል፤ ቀጣዩ የፍርድ ቤት ቀጠሮም ለሐምሌ ወር ተይዟል።
oromo: Influensarri Andrew Tate fi obboleessi isaa Tristan gara biyya Ingilizitti akka dabarfaman taasisuuf adeemsa seeraa jalqabuuf mana murtee Floridaatti dhiyaataniiru. Obbolaan kun himannaa saalaan wal-qunnamtii dirqisiisuu fi namoota seeraan ala gurguruu dabalatee himannaa haaraa 38 irratti banameef kan morman yoo ta'u, abukaatoon isaanii himannaan kun kan biyya lafaa fi siyaasaa irratti xiyyeeffate jedhaniiru. Abukaatoon isaanii adeemsa gara Ingilizitti dabarfamuu kana kan morman yoo ta'u, beellamni mana murtee isaanii itti aanu ji'a Adoolessaatti qabameera.

title: Gaza residents weigh in on election of new Hamas leader
english: Hamas has appointed Khalil al-Hayya as its new leader, sparking diverse opinions among the people living in Gaza. While some residents view this leadership transition as a major political development, others are skeptical about whether it will improve the dire humanitarian situation. Many are waiting to see if this change in command will influence the ongoing conflict or provide relief for civilians.
amharic: ሃማስ ካሊል አል-ሃያን አዲሱ መሪ አድርጎ መሾሙ በጋዛ ነዋሪዎች ዘንድ የተለያየ ምላሽ ፈጥሯል። አንዳንዶች ይህ የሥልጣን ሽግግር ትልቅ የፖለቲካ ፋይዳ እንዳለው ሲያምኑ፣ ሌሎች ግን ለውጡ በጋዛ ያለውን የከፋ የሰብዓዊ ቀውስ ለመቅረፍ እንደሚረዳ ጥርጣሬ አላቸው። ነዋሪዎቹ ይህ የአመራር ለውጥ በጦርነቱ ላይ ወይም በሲቪሎች ዕለት ተዕለት ሕይወት ላይ ምን ለውጥ እንደሚያመጣ በጉጉት እየጠበቁ ናቸው።
oromo: Hamaas hogganaa haaraa isaa godhatee Khalil al-Hayya filachuun isaa jiraattota Gaaza biratti yaada gara garaa uumeera. Namoonni tokko tokko jijjiiramni kun dhimma siyaasaa guddaa ta'uu isaa yoo ibsan, biroon garuu hogganaan kun rakkoo namoomaa naannichatti hammaate furuu danda'a jedhanii shakku. Jiraattonni jijjiiramni kun waraana ykn jireenya siviilotaa irratti dhiibbaa qabaachuu isaa baruuf eegaa jiru.

title: How will Zelenskyy handle the growing political crisis at home?
english: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is currently managing a dual challenge as Ukraine faces intensifying Russian missile strikes while dealing with domestic political instability. The dismissal of a defense minister has triggered public protests and raised concerns about potential leadership rifts within the government. These internal tensions are causing anxiety, as experts fear such divisions could weaken Ukraine's position and potentially benefit Russia during the ongoing conflict.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ቮሎዲሚር ዘለንስኪ በዩክሬን እየተባባሰ በመጣው የሩሲያ የሮኬት ጥቃት እና በውስጣዊ የፖለቲካ ቀውስ መካከል ይገኛሉ። የመከላከያ ሚኒስትር ከሥራ መባረር ተከትሎ በተነሳው ህዝባዊ ተቃውሞ በመንግስት ከፍተኛ አመራሮች መካከል ክፍፍል መኖሩን ስጋት ፈጥሯል። ይህ የውስጥ አለመረጋጋት በጦርነቱ ላይ ተጽእኖ በመፍጠር ለሩሲያ የላቀ ዕድል ሊሰጥ እንደሚችል ባለሙያዎች ይናገራሉ።
oromo: Pirezidaant Volodimir Zeelenski waraana biyyattii irratti Rashiyaan haleellaa rookeettii cimaa geggeessaa jirtuu fi rakkoo siyaasaa keessa biyyaatti mudateen wal qabatee qormaata cimaa keessa jiru. Ministirri ittisaa hojii irraa buufamuun isaa mormii uummataa kakaaseera akkasumas gidduu geggeessitoota mootummaa keessatti wal dhabdeen jiraachuu isaa shakkisiiseera. Haalli kun nageenya biyyattii miidhee fi karaa biraa immoo Rashiyaaf carraa gaarii ta'uu danda'a jedhamee sodaatamaa jira.

title: Ortega insists no more elections for Nicaragua
english: Nicaraguan President Daniel Ortega has officially declared an end to elections in his country, stating that he will no longer allow political opposition groups to challenge his rule. He claims this decision is necessary to prevent influence from the United States and to solidify his control after years of cracking down on political rivals. International organizations and human rights groups have long criticized Ortega’s administration for suppressing dissent, detaining opponents, and dismantling democratic institutions.
amharic: የኒካራጓው ፕሬዚዳንት ዳንኤል ኦርቴጋ በሀገሪቱ ከአሁን በኋላ ምርጫ እንደማይኖር በይፋ አስታውቀዋል። ኦርቴጋ ይህንን ውሳኔ የወሰኑት የተቃዋሚ ፓርቲዎች በምርጫ ስም ስልጣንን እንዳይቀሙ ለመከላከል በሚል ምክንያት ነው። ዓለም አቀፍ ተቋማት እና የሰብአዊ መብት ተሟጋቾች መንግስታቸው ተቃዋሚዎችን በማሰር እና የዴሞክራሲ ስርአቱን በማፈን ለረጅም ጊዜ ስልጣን ላይ ለመቆየት እየሰራ ነው ሲሉ በሰፊው ይተቻሉ።
oromo: Pirezedantiin Nikaraaguwaa Daani’eel Orteegaa biyyattii keessatti kanaan booda filannoon akka hin geggeeffamne ifa godhaniiru. Orteegaa murtee kana kan dabarsan, gareewwan mormituu biyyattii aangoo akka hin fudhanneef jechuun ta’uu isaa ibsaniiru. Dhaabbileen idil-addunyaa fi mirga namoomaa falman, mootummaan isaa mormitoota hidhuu fi sirna dimookiraasii ukkaamsuun aangoo qabachuuf yaaluu isaa cimsanii balaaleffachaa jiru.

title: Man arrested after fire outside New York immigration court
english: A man was taken into custody in New York City after using an incendiary device to start a fire outside an immigration court building. The targeted facility serves as a workspace for several federal agencies, such as the FBI and ICE. Authorities are currently investigating the incident.
amharic: ኒው ዮርክ ከተማ በሚገኝ የኢሚግሬሽን ፍርድ ቤት ህንጻ ውጭ እሳት የለኮሰ አንድ ሰው በቁጥጥር ስር ውሏል። ይህ ህንጻ የኤፍቢአይን (FBI) እና የኢሚግሬሽን እና የጉምሩክ ማስፈጸሚያ (ICE) ጨምሮ በርካታ የፌደራል ተቋማት የሚገኙበት ቦታ ነው። ባለስልጣናት በጉዳዩ ላይ ምርመራ እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Magala New Yorkitti namni tokko mana murtiin godaantotaa itti argamu irratti ibiddaan miidhaa geessiseef to'annoo jala ooleera. Mana hojii kana keessa dhaabbileen federaalaa akka FBI fi ICE fayyadamoo dha. Abbootiin taayitaa dhimma kana irratti qorannoo gaggeessaa jiru.

title: Monsoon-driven flash flooding kills at least 20 in Afghanistan
english: Severe monsoon-triggered flash floods have struck Afghanistan's Nuristan province, resulting in at least 20 deaths and over 80 injuries. The disaster destroyed numerous homes, shops, and municipal infrastructure in the city of Parun, leaving several local officials missing. Emergency response teams are currently conducting search and rescue operations to locate survivors amidst the widespread destruction.
amharic: በአፍጋኒስታን ኑሪስታን ግዛት በደረሰ ኃይለኛ የጎርፍ አደጋ ቢያንስ 20 ሰዎች ሕይወታቸው አልፏል ከ80 በላይ የሚሆኑት ደግሞ ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። የፓሩን ከተማን ያጥለቀለቀው የጎርፍ መጥለቅለቅ መኖሪያ ቤቶችን፣ ሱቆችን እና የመንግስት መሥሪያ ቤቶችን በማውደም ለከፍተኛ ውድመት ዳርጓል። በአሁኑ ወቅት የአደጋ ጊዜ ሠራተኞች የጠፉ ሰዎችን ለማግኘት እና የነፍስ አድን ሥራዎችን ለማከናወን ጥረት እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: ጅጅጅጋራan roobni cimaan godina Nuuristaan kan Afganistaan keessatti hammaatee bishaan lolaa namoota 20 ol ajjeeseera, namoonni 80 ol immoo miidhaniiru. Lolaan kun magaalaa Paarun keessatti manneen, suuqotaa fi gamoo mootummaa barbadeesseera, akkasumas hoggantoonni magaalaa muraasni badaniiru. Yeroo ammaa kanatti gareen gargaarsaa namoota badanii jiran barbaaduufi miidhamtoota gargaaruuf hojjechaa jiru.

title: Multiple explosions heard in Iran's Chabahar and Konarak
english: Local media outlets in Iran have reported that a series of explosions occurred in the southern coastal cities of Chabahar and Konarak. Authorities are currently monitoring the situation in the region. Further details regarding the cause or potential damage from these blasts have not yet been disclosed.
amharic: በኢራን የሚገኙ የዜና አውታሮች በደቡባዊቷ የኢራን ከተሞች በቻባሃር እና በኮናራክ በርካታ ፍንዳታዎች መከሰታቸውን ዘግበዋል። ባለሥልጣናት በአካባቢው ያለውን ሁኔታ በቅርበት እየተከታተሉ ይገኛሉ። ስለ ፍንዳታዎቹ መንስኤ ወይም ስለደረሰው ጉዳት እስካሁን የተገለጸ ነገር የለም።
oromo: Miidiyaaleen biyya Iraan akka gabaasanitti, magaalonni kibba Iraan kan ta'an Chaabahaar fi Konaaraak keessatti dhuka'oonni hedduun dhaga'amaniiru. Aangeyyoonni haala naannichaa hordofaa jiru. Sababa dhuka'ichaa ykn miidhaa ga'e ilaalchisee odeeffannoon dabalataa hanga ammaatti ifa hin baane.

title: Reports of explosions on Iran's Qeshm Island
english: Local media outlets in Iran have reported that multiple explosions occurred on Qeshm Island this past Monday. Details regarding the exact cause or impact of these incidents remain limited at this stage. Official sources have yet to provide further context on the situation.
amharic: የኢራን የዜና ወኪል በሰኞ ዕለት በቄሽም ደሴት ላይ ተከታታይ ፍንዳታዎች መከሰታቸውን ዘግቧል። ስለ ፍንዳታዎቹ መንስኤ ወይም ጉዳት እስካሁን የተገለጸ ዝርዝር መረጃ የለም። ባለስልጣናት በጉዳዩ ላይ ተጨማሪ ማብራሪያ አልሰጡም።
oromo: Gabaasni miidiyaa Iraan akka ibsetti, guyyaa Wiixata darbe qe'ee Qeshm irratti dhukaatiin hedduun dhaga'ameera. Sababaa fi miidhaa dhukaatiin kun geessise ilaalchisee hanga ammaatti odeeffannoon bal'aan hin kennamne. Aangawaan mootummaa waa'ee dhimma kanaa irratti ibsa dabalataa hin kennine.

title: Israeli forces detain five Palestinians, including two children, in occupied West Bank
english: Israeli military forces conducted a raid on the village of Kisan near Bethlehem on Monday evening. During the operation, soldiers searched multiple homes and arrested five Palestinian residents. Among those taken into custody were two minors, ages 15 and 16.
amharic: የእስራኤል ወታደሮች ሰኞ አመሻሽ ላይ በቤተልሔም አቅራቢያ በምትገኘው ኪሳን መንደር ወረራ አካሄዱ። በኦፕሬሽኑ ወቅት ወታደሮቹ በርካታ ቤቶችን ከመረመሩ በኋላ አምስት ፍልስጤማውያንን በቁጥጥር ስር አውለዋል። ከተያዙት መካከል ዕድሜያቸው 15 እና 16 የሆኑ ሁለት ህጻናት ይገኙበታል።
oromo: Humnoonni waraana Israa'el Dilbata galgala ganda Betlehemitti dhihoo jirtu kan taate Kisaan keessatti duula gaggeessaniiru. Duula kanaan mana jireenyaa hedduu sakatta'uun, lammiilee Falasxiin shan to'annaa jala oolchaniiru. Namoota to'ataman keessaa ijoolleen umurii 15 fi 16 ta'an lama argamu.

title: Saudi-led coalition in Yemen says it will respond to Houthi's threats to ships with force
english: The Saudi-led coalition has vowed to use military force in response to Houthi threats against shipping lanes. This decision follows the Houthis' attempt to block naval traffic, which the coalition firmly denies. Consequently, Saudi authorities are now putting new security protocols in place to protect vessels navigating the Bab el-Mandeb Strait.
amharic: በሳዑዲ አረቢያ የሚመራው ጥምረት በሁቲ አማጽያን የመርከብ ጉዞ ላይ ለሚቃጡ ስጋቶች በወታደራዊ ኃይል እንደሚመልስ አስታውቋል። ይህ ውሳኔ የተወሰደው ሁቲዎች የባህር ላይ እገዳ መጣላቸውን ተከትሎ ሲሆን ጥምረቱ ክሱ መሰረተ ቢስ መሆኑን ገልጿል። ሳዑዲ አረቢያ በባብ ኤል-ማንዴብ የባህር ጠረፍ የሚያልፉ መርከቦችን ደህንነት ለመጠበቅ አዳዲስ የጥበቃ እርምጃዎችን መጀመሯን አስታውቃለች።
oromo: Mootummoonni Saudii durfamtuun gama isaanitiin, gareen Huutii dooniiwwan irratti balaa agarsiisuu isaa dura dhaabbachuuf humna waraanaa akka fayyadaman ibsaniiru. Tarkaanfiin kun kan dhufe erga gareen Huutii daandii galaanaa ugguruuf yaalii godhee booda yoo ta'u, gama isaaniitiin Saudiin himannaa kana guutummaatti haaltu. Kanaafis, mootummoonni kunneen dooniiwwan daandii Bab el-Mandeb keessa darban eeguuf tattaaffii nageenyaa cimsuuf murteessaniiru.

title: US Centcom says it has launched new round of strikes on Iran
english: The United States military has initiated a fresh series of strikes against Iran following orders from the President. These operations aim to weaken Iranian military assets that have been threatening cargo ships traveling through the Strait of Hormuz. The mission is part of an ongoing effort to improve safety for commercial maritime traffic in the region.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል በፕሬዝዳንቱ ትዕዛዝ በአይራን ላይ አዲስ የአየር ጥቃት መፈጸሙን አስታውቋል። ይህ እርምጃ በሆርሙዝ የባህር መተላለፊያ ላይ የንግድ መርከቦችን ሲያጠቁ የነበሩ የአይራን ወታደራዊ አቅሞችን ለማዳከም ያለመ ነው። ጥቃቱ በክልሉ የሚደረገውን የንግድ መርከቦች እንቅስቃሴ ደህንነት ለማስጠበቅ የታሰበ ነው።
oromo: Waraanni Amerikaa ajaja pirezidaantii biyyattii hordofuun Iranirratti haleellaa haarawaa geggeessuu isaa beeksiseera. Haleellaan kun kan xiyyeeffate meeshaalee waraanaa Iran kanneen daandii galaana Hormuz keessa maashinoota daldalaa miidhuuf fayyadan dadhabsiisuufi. Tarkaanfiin kun nageenya dooniiwwan daldalaa naannichatti socho'anii eeguuf kan taasifameedha.

title: Yemeni women support families through enterprise as economic crisis bites
english: In Yemen, a severe economic crisis and the ongoing civil war have made it difficult for families to survive on a single income. To address this, many women are breaking traditional gender roles by working alongside their husbands to run small businesses. A successful example is a couple in Taiz who operate a fast-food restaurant together, showing how shared effort and partnership help them navigate extreme financial hardship.
amharic: በየመን ያለው ከባድ የኢኮኖሚ ቀውስ እና የእርስ በርስ ጦርነት ቤተሰቦች በአንድ የገቢ ምንጭ እንዲተዳደሩ አዳጋች አድርጎባቸዋል። ለዚህ ችግር መፍትሄ ለመስጠት፣ ብዙ ሴቶች ባህላዊ አመለካከቶችን በመስበር ከባሎቻቸው ጎን በመቆም የራሳቸውን አነስተኛ ንግድ በመምራት ላይ ይገኛሉ። በታኢዝ ከተማ የሚኖሩ አንድ ጥንዶች ፈጣን የምግብ ቤት ስራን በጋራ በማከናወን፣ የጋራ ጥረት ለቤተሰብ ኢኮኖሚያዊ ችግር መፍትሄ እንደሚሆን በተግባር እያሳዩ ነው።
oromo: Yemen keessatti rakkoon dinagdee cimaafi waraansi biyya keessaa maatiin galii tokkoon akka jiraatan baay'ee ulfaataa taasiseera. Rakkoo kana furuuf, dubartoonni baay'een aadaa durii cabsuun abbootii manaa isaanii waliin ta'uun hojii daldalaa xixinnoo gaggeessaa jiru. Fakkeenyaaf, magaalatti Taiz keessatti kan argaman abbaa manaa fi haadha manaa lamaan tokko ta'uun mana nyaataa saffisaa gaggeessaa jiran kun, waliin hojjechuun rakkina dinagdee keessatti jijjiirama akka fidu kan mul'isu dha.

title: EU pauses methane penalties amid energy crisis, US pressure
english: The European Union has suggested pausing financial penalties for oil and gas companies that fail to meet methane emission standards between 2027 and 2030. This decision follows significant pressure from the United States and other energy-exporting nations worried about supply disruptions amid the ongoing Middle East conflict. While the regulation remains in place, officials believe this temporary relief is necessary to maintain stable energy supplies during the current global crisis.
amharic: የአውሮፓ ህብረት ከ2027 እስከ 2030 ባለው ጊዜ ውስጥ የሚቴን ልቀት መስፈርቶችን የማያሟሉ የነዳጅ እና ጋዝ ኩባንያዎች ላይ የሚጣል የገንዘብ ቅጣት እንዲቆይ ሐሳብ አቅርቧል። ይህ ውሳኔ የተወሰደው በመካከለኛው ምስራቅ ግጭት ሳቢያ ሊከሰት የሚችለውን የኃይል አቅርቦት መስተጓጎል በመስጋት በአሜሪካ እና በሌሎች አገራት በተደረገ ጫና ነው። ደንቡ አሁንም በሥራ ላይ ቢሆንም፣ ባለስልጣናት በአሁኑ የዓለም አቀፍ የኃይል ቀውስ ወቅት አቅርቦትን ለማረጋጋት ይህ ጊዜያዊ እፎይታ አስፈላጊ እንደሆነ ያምናሉ።
oromo: Gamtaan Awurooppaa, kampanonni boba'aa fi gaazii seera gadi-lakkisa gaazii meeteenii (methane) hin guunne adabbii maallaqaa irraa hanga bara 2030tti akka bilisa ta'an yaada dhiyeesseera. Murtoon kun kan dhufe dhiibbaa Ameerikaa fi biyyoota biroo waraana giddu gala bahaa irraa kan ka'e dhiyeessii anniisaa irratti dhiibbaan akka hin uumamneef yaadamee dha. Seerichi akka jiru ta'us, qondaalonni akka jedhanitti, yeroo ammaa kana rakkoo anniisaa addunyaa mudate kana keessatti dhiyeessii tasgabbii qabuuf jecha tarkaanfiin kun barbaachisaa dha.

title: US judge orders pause on Paramount–Warner Bros merger
english: A US judge has temporarily halted the planned merger between Paramount and Warner Bros following a lawsuit filed by 12 states concerned about reduced competition and potential job losses. The court has given these states two weeks to present their formal arguments, with a hearing scheduled for August. This delay puts Paramount at risk of significant financial penalties, as the company faces high quarterly fees if the agreement is not finalized by late September.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ዳኛ በፓራማውንት እና በዋርነር ብሮስ መካከል ሊደረግ የነበረው ውህደት፣ ውድድርን ይቀንሳል እና የስራ ዕድልን ይጎዳል በሚል በ12 ግዛቶች የቀረበውን ክስ ተከትሎ እንዲቆም ትዕዛዝ ሰጥተዋል። ፍርድ ቤቱ እነዚህ ግዛቶች ክሳቸውን በዝርዝር እንዲያቀርቡ ለሁለት ሳምንታት ጊዜ የሰጠ ሲሆን፣ የችሎት ቀጠሮም ለነሐሴ ወር ተይዟል። ውህደቱ እስከ መስከረም መጨረሻ ካልተጠናቀቀ ኩባንያው ከፍተኛ የገንዘብ ቅጣት የሚጠብቀው በመሆኑ፣ ይህ መዘግየት በፓራማውንት ላይ ትልቅ የገንዘብ ጫና ሊፈጥር ይችላል።
oromo: Abbaan seeraa tokko mootummoota gamtoomaniin 12 ta'an waldorgommii hir'isaa fi hojii dhabsiisa jechuun himannaa dhiyeessaniin walqabatee, walitti makamuun Paramount fi Warner Bros akka dhaabbatu ajajaniiru. Manni maree mootummoota kanaaf ragaa isaanii dhiyeeffachuuf torbee lamaaf yeroo kenne yoo ta'u, dhaddachiis ji'a Hagayyaa keessa kan godhamu ta'a. Walitti makamuun kun hanga dhuma ji'a Fulbaanaatti yoo hin xumaramne, Paramount kaffaltii guddaa waan irraa eeggamuuf, tursiisa kanaan miidhaa maallaqaa guddaa keessa galuu danda'a.

title: A tournament of contradictions: What did we learn at World Cup 2026?
english: Spain emerged as the champions of the 2026 World Cup after defeating Argentina in a final marked by an awkward interaction between US President Donald Trump and FIFA officials. The tournament was a blend of athletic brilliance and political tension, featuring both inspiring underdog stories and controversies regarding travel restrictions and refereeing. Ultimately, the event highlighted how football remains a powerful force that can unite global fans despite the complicated political landscape surrounding it.
amharic: ስፔን አርጀንቲናን በማሸነፍ የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸናፊ ሆናለች፤ የፍፃሜው ጨዋታም በአሜሪካ ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ እና በፊፋ ባለስልጣናት መካከል በተፈጠረ አስቸጋሪ ሁኔታ ይታወሳል። ውድድሩ አስደናቂ የስፖርት ክንውኖችን እና የፖለቲካ ውጥረቶችን ያዘለ ነበር፤ በተለይም በጉዞ ገደቦች እና በዳኝነት አወዛጋቢ ውሳኔዎች የተነሳ ትችቶች ቀርበውበታል። በአጠቃላይ ውድድሩ ውስብስብ የፖለቲካ ሁኔታዎች ቢኖሩም፣ እግር ኳስ ህዝቦችን በአንድነት የማሰባሰብ አቅም እንዳለው አሳይቷል።
oromo: Ispayin arjantiinaa injifachuun xumura tapha waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 injifatteetti, taphni xumuraas walitti bu'iinsa uumame gidduu pirezedaantii Ameerikaa Doonaald Tiraampii fi hoggantoota FIFA'n kan yaadatamu dha. Taphoonni kunneen ogummaa ispoortii fi dhiibbaa siyaasaa kan walitti qabate ture, keessattuu dhimmoota hayyama seenuu fi murtii abbaa seeraa irratti komiin cimaan tureera. Haata'u malee, taphni kun haala siyaasaa walxaxaa keessatti illee kubbaan miilaa humna namoota tokko gochuu danda'u akka qabu ragaa ta'eera.

title: Protests in Italy after Moroccan man dies during arrest
english: A 42-year-old Moroccan man named Abderrahim Fakir died in Bologna, Italy, after being restrained by police during an arrest. Footage of the incident has sparked widespread protests, with many comparing the event to the death of George Floyd in the United States. While the government has defended the police's actions, opposition leaders and activists are calling for a thorough investigation and greater accountability.
amharic: በጣሊያን ቦሎኛ ከተማ አብደራሂም ፋኪር የተባሉ የ42 ዓመት ሞሮኳዊ ዜጋ በፖሊስ ቁጥጥር ስር በነበሩበት ወቅት ህይወታቸው አልፏል። የክስተቱ ቪዲዮ በዩናይትድ ስቴትስ የጆርጅ ፍሎይድን ሞት የሚያስታውስ በመሆኑ በሀገሪቱ ከፍተኛ ተቃውሞ ቀስቅሷል። መንግስት የፖሊሶችን ድርጊት ቢከላከልም፣ ተቃዋሚዎችና የሰብአዊ መብት ተሟጋቾች ጉዳዩ በገለልተኛ አካል እንዲጣራና ተጠያቂነት እንዲሰፍን እየጠየቁ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Magalaa Bologna kan Xaaliyaaniitti namni lammii Marookoo waggaa 42 Abderrahim Fakir jedhamu erga poolisiin qabamee booda lubbuun isaa darbeera. Viidiyoon yeroo inni qabamu mul’isu walfakkaataa ajjeechaa George Floyd kan Ameerikaatti raawwatamee waan fakkaatuuf, biyyattii keessatti mormii guddaan ka’eera. Mootummaan gocha poolisootaa kan ittise yoo ta’u, mormitoonniifi dhaabbileen mirga namoomaa garuu qorannoon hatattamaan akka gaggeeffamuufi ittigaafatamuun akka jiraatu gaafachaa jiru.

title: Everyday Authoritarianism Threatens Ethiopia’s Democratic Ambitions
english: Ethiopia's struggle with democracy is rooted in a deeply ingrained social culture that prioritizes blind obedience over critical thinking. From childhood, individuals are conditioned to view questioning as a sign of disrespect, a pattern that persists in schools, workplaces, and government institutions. This cycle of hierarchy suppresses open dialogue and hinders the country's progress toward a more democratic society.
amharic: የኢትዮጵያ የዴሞክራሲ ችግር የመነጨው ጥያቄን እንደ አለመታዘዝ በሚቆጥር እና አድርባይነትን በሚያበረታታ ጥልቅ ማህበራዊ አስተሳሰብ ነው። ከቤተሰብ ጀምሮ በትምህርት ቤት እና በስራ ቦታ የሚታየው ይህ የአሰራር ዘይቤ፣ ሰዎችን ሃሳብ ከመግለጽ እና ተገቢውን ጥያቄ ከማንሳት እንዲቆጠቡ ያደርጋል። ይህ ባህል ውይይትን በማፈን ሀገሪቱ ወደ እውነተኛ ዴሞክራሲ እንዳትሸጋገር እንቅፋት ሆኗል።
oromo: Rakkoon demokrasii Itoophiyaa keessatti mul'atu aadaa hawaasummaa gaaffii kaasuu akka tuffiitti ilaaluufi ajajamuufi bitamuu qofa irratti hundaa'e irraa kan maddeedha. Ijoollummaa irraa kaasee mana barnootaa fi bakka hojiitti namoonni yaada isaanii ibsuu irraa akka of qusatan kan godhu sirni kun, marii walabaa irratti gufuu ta'a. Amalli wal-caalmaa kana jajjabeessu kun biyyattiin gara sirna demokraasii dhugaatti akka hin ceene dhiibbaa godha.

title: Yemen's Houthis announce 'maritime embargo' on Saudi Arabia
english: The Houthi movement in Yemen has declared a maritime embargo against Saudi Arabia, aiming to block Saudi vessels from passing through the strategic Bab al-Mandab Strait. The group claims this action is a direct response to a long-standing Saudi blockade on Yemeni ports and airports. This escalation follows recent missile attacks and heightens tensions in a conflict that has caused a severe humanitarian crisis for over a decade.
amharic: በየመን የሚንቀሳቀሱት የሁቲ ታጣቂዎች በሳውዲ አረቢያ ላይ የባህር ላይ እገዳ መጣላቸውን አስታውቀዋል። ይህ እርምጃ ሳውዲ አረቢያ በየመን ወደቦች እና አየር ማረፊያዎች ላይ የጣለችውን እገዳ ለመበቀል የተወሰደ መሆኑን ቡድኑ ገልጿል። ውሳኔው በባብ ኤል-ማንደብ የባህር መስመር ላይ የሳውዲ መርከቦችን እንቅስቃሴ የሚገድብ ሲሆን፣ ይህም ከአስር አመታት በላይ የቆየውን የሁለቱ ወገኖች ግጭት ይበልጥ አባብሶታል።
oromo: Humni Hutiin Yaman, sa'aatii kana sa'aatii xumuraa akka ta'etti, markaboota Sa'udii iratti dhiibbaa fi dhorkaa galaanaa kan labse ta'uu beeksiseera. Hutiin tarkaanfii kana kan fudhate, Sa'udiin buufataalee fi dirree xiyyaaraa Yamanirratti dhorkaa kaa'uu ishee mormuuf akka ta'e ibseera. Labsii kanaan, Hutiin karaa galaanaa Bab al-Mandab keessatti markaboota Sa'udii akka dhorku kan beekame yoo ta'u, kunis waldhabdee biyyoota lamaanii fi rakkoo namoomaa biyyattii keessatti guddachaa jiruuf xumura kan hin argine ta'uu isaa agarsiisa.

title: Rare identical quadruplets born in Australia
english: A 34-year-old woman in Australia has given birth to rare, naturally-conceived identical quadruplets at the Royal Brisbane and Women's Hospital. The four girls were delivered safely via caesarean section at 28 weeks, a result experts describe as incredibly rare given the shared placenta. Both the mother and her four newborn babies are currently healthy and recovering in the neonatal intensive care unit.
amharic: በአውስትራሊያ የሚገኙ የ34 ዓመት እናት በአይነቱ ለየት ያለ የተፈጥሮ አራት መንታ ሴት ልጆችን በሮያል ብሪስቤን እና ሴቶች ሆስፒታል ወለዱ። ዶክተሮች እንደገለጹት አራቱም ህጻናት አንድ አይነት የእንግዴ ልጅ የሚጋሩ በመሆናቸው በ15 ሚሊዮን እርግዝናዎች ውስጥ አንድ ጊዜ ብቻ የሚያጋጥም በጣም ብርቅዬ ክስተት ነው። አራቱም ጨቅላዎች እና እናታቸው በጥሩ የጤና ሁኔታ ላይ የሚገኙ ሲሆን፣ ህጻናቱ አስፈላጊው ክትትል እንዲደረግላቸው በሆስፒታሉ የፅኑ ህክምና ክፍል ውስጥ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Dubartiin umrii 34 biyya Awustiraaliyaa keessa jiraattu tokko, mana yaala Royal Brisbane and Women's Hospital keessatti ijoollee durbaa afur kan wal fakkaatan karaa uumamaa deesseetti. Ogeeyyiin fayyaa akka ibsanitti, ijoolleen kun afuranuu kan wal fakkaatan fi kan uumaman haadha tokko irraa waan ta'eef, kunis garaa keessatti yeroo 15 miliyoona keessatti si'a tokko qofa kan mudatu ta'uu ibsameera. Haati fi ijoolleen kun afuranuu yeroo ammaa fayyaa kan qaban yoo ta'u, ijoolleen kunis mana yaalichaa keessatti hordoffii fayyaa barbaachisaa taasifamaafii jira.

title: Notorious drug cartel leader Ismael Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
english: Ismael Zambada, a top co-founder of Mexico's Sinaloa drug cartel, has been sentenced to life in prison by a US judge. He was captured in 2024 following an elaborate sting operation and later pleaded guilty to major drug trafficking charges. Alongside his life sentence, he was ordered to pay $15 billion in profits earned from his illegal criminal activities.
amharic: የሜክሲኮው የሲናሎአ አደንዛዥ ዕፅ ካርቴል ተባባሪ መስራች ኢስማኤል ዛምባዳ በዩኤስ አሜሪካ ፍርድ ቤት የዕድሜ ልክ እስራት ተፈረደበት። በ2024 በተደረገ ልዩ ወጥመድ ከተያዘ በኋላ በአደንዛዥ ዕፅ ዝውውር ወንጀል ጥፋተኛ ሆኖ በመገኘቱ ነው ቅጣቱ የተወሰነበት። ከእስራት ቅጣቱ በተጨማሪ፣ በህገ-ወጥ መንገድ ካገኘው የ15 ቢሊዮን ዶላር ትርፍ እንዲከፍልም ፍርድ ቤቱ ትእዛዝ አስተላልፏል።
oromo: Ismaa'eel Zaambaadaa, hundeeessaa fi geggeessaa dhaabbata yakka darbiinsa qoricha sammuu namaa hadoochu (Sinaloa Cartel) kan Meeksiko keessatti beekamu, mana murtii UStiin hidha waggaa guutuu itti murteeffame. Nama kana bara 2024 tooftaa xaxamaa ta'een qabamee erga qabamee booda, yakka seeraan ala qoricha sammuu namaa hadoochu guuruun yakkamuu isaa fudhateera. Hidhaa kana malees, qabeenya yakka kana irraa argate keessaa doolaara biliyoona 15 akka kaffalu mana murtichaatti ajajameera.

title: Petrol prices climb as US–Iran tensions disrupt markets
english: Global oil and petrol prices are surging due to renewed military tensions between the United States and Iran, which have disrupted critical shipping routes. Concerns over tanker movement through the Strait of Hormuz and potential blockades in the Red Sea have led to a sharp rise in fuel costs for American consumers. Despite recent reports of declining inflation, gas prices in the US have now climbed to an average of four dollars per gallon.
amharic: በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል ያለው ውጥረት እየተባባሰ በመምጣቱ እና የንግድ መርከቦች ማለፊያ መስመሮች በመስተጓጎላቸው የነዳጅ ዋጋ በአለም አቀፍ ደረጃ እየጨመረ ነው። በሆርሙዝ የባህር ዳርቻ እና በቀይ ባህር ላይ ያለው የፀጥታ ስጋት የአቅርቦት ሰንሰለቱን በመጉዳቱ የነዳጅ ዋጋ እንዲንር አድርጓል። ምንም እንኳን ባለፈው ሳምንት የዋጋ ግሽበት ቀንሶ የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ በአሜሪካ በአሁኑ ወቅት በአማካይ የአንድ ጋሎን ቤንዚን ዋጋ ወደ አራት ዶላር ከፍ ብሏል።
oromo: Walitti buutiin Ameerikaa fi Iraan gidduutti uumame akkasumas dhiibbaan karaa bishaan irraa irratti taasifame gatiin boba'aa addunyaa irraatti akka dabalu taasiseera. Dhiphina dhangala'aa bishaan Hormuz fi daandiin galaana diimaa irratti soda jiruun wal qabatee gatiin boba'aa dabaluun isaa uummata Ameerikaa irratti dhiibbaa uumeera. Gatiin infileshiinii gadi bu'uun isaa gabaafamee tureyyuu, amma qabxii gatii boba'aa Ameerikaa keessatti gaaloona tokkoof gara doolaara afuritti guddateera.

title: FIFA World Cup: Five key takeaways from 2026 edition won by Spain
english: Spain emerged as the champions of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after defeating Argentina in the final match. The tournament was significantly influenced by geopolitical tensions between the host nation, the United States, and Iran, which caused various diplomatic and travel complications. Despite concerns regarding the expanded 48-team format, the competition successfully highlighted that the skill gap between elite nations and smaller teams is shrinking.
amharic: ስፔን በአርጀንቲና ላይ ድል በመቀዳጀት የ2026 የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸናፊ ሆናለች። ውድድሩ አስተናጋጇ አሜሪካ እና ኢራን መካከል በነበረው የፖለቲካ ውጥረት ምክንያት በዲፕሎማሲያዊ እና በቪዛ ችግሮች ታጅቦ ነበር። ምንም እንኳን የቡድኖች ቁጥር ወደ 48 ማደጉ ስጋት ፈጥሮ የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ ውድድሩ በኃያላን እና በሌሎች ቡድኖች መካከል ያለው የክህሎት ልዩነት እየጠበበ መምጣቱን አሳይቷል።
oromo: Ispeeniin tapha xumuraa irratti Arjentiinaa injifachuun waancaa Addunyaa FIFA bara 2026 fudhatteetti. Taphoonni kun biyya keessummeessituu Ameerikaafi biyya Iraan gidduutti walitti bu'iinsa siyaasaa tureefi dhimma visaarratti rakkoowwan mudataniin miidhamee ture. Gareewwan 48 hirmaachuun isaa shakkii uumee tureyyuu, taphoonni kun biyyoota gurguddoofi garee xixiqqaa gidduutti dandeettiin taphattootaa walcinaa ga'aa akka jiru mirkaneesseera.

title: Mexican drug lord Ismael ‘El Mayo’ Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
english: Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada, a prominent leader of the Sinaloa Cartel, has been sentenced to life in a US prison. The 76-year-old pleaded guilty to drug trafficking and organized crime charges after being arrested in 2024. This ruling concludes his decades-long career of leading one of Mexico's most violent criminal organizations.
amharic: የሲናሎአ ካርቴል መሪ የነበረው ኢስማኤል 'ኤል ማዮ' ዛምባዳ በአሜሪካ ፍርድ ቤት የዕድሜ ልክ እስራት ተፈርዶበታል። የ76 ዓመቱ ግለሰብ እ.ኤ.አ. በ2024 ከተያዙ በኋላ በአደንዛዥ ዕፅ ዝውውር እና በወንጀል ድርጅት መሪነት ጥፋተኛ መሆናቸውን አምነዋል። ይህ ብይን የሜክሲኮን በጣም አደገኛ የወንጀል ቡድኖች ለረጅም ዓመታት የመሩት ግለሰብን የዘመናት እንቅስቃሴ አክድሟል።
oromo: Hoggantoota garee yakka 'Sinaloa Cartel' kan ta'an Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada irratti mana murtii USitti hidhaa umrii guutuu murteeffame. Umuriin isaanii waggaa 76 kan ta'an kun, bara 2024 erga qabamanii booda yakka garaagaraa raawwachuu isaanii amanuu isaanii hordofee murtiin kun kenname. Murtiin kun hoogganaa garee yakka beekamaa fi hamaa ta'e kanaa hojii isaa waggoota dheeraa ture kan xumuruudha.

title: Spain team arrives home after winning the World Cup
english: The Spanish national team has returned to their home country following their victory over Argentina in the World Cup final. The players arrived with the championship trophy in hand shortly after the match. A grand celebration parade is scheduled to take place in Madrid later today to honor the team's achievement.
amharic: የስፔን ብሔራዊ ቡድን በአርጀንቲና ላይ ድል ተቀዳጅተው የዓለም ዋንጫውን ካሸነፉ በኋላ ወደ አገራቸው ተመልሰዋል። ተጫዋቾቹ ዋንጫውን ይዘው በትናንትናው ዕለት ወደ ማድሪድ የገቡ ሲሆን፣ ዛሬ ሰኞ በከተማዋ ለቡድኑ የሚደረግ የድል ሰልፍ ተዘጋጅቷል።
oromo: Garee kubbaa miillaa Ispeen injifannoo Ardjiintinaa irratti argataniin booda waancaa addunyaa fudhatanii gara biyyatti deebi'aniiru. Gareen kun waancaa isaa qabatanii erga deebi'anii booda, har'a Dilbata ta'e ayyaana injifannoo guddaa Magaalaa Maadriiditti qopheessuuf karoorfataniiru.

title: Israeli air strike injures 14 in Gaza City
english: An Israeli military air strike in Gaza City has left at least 14 individuals wounded. The attack specifically targeted a member of the Hamas organization, according to Israeli military reports. Visual evidence from the scene shows a vehicle completely destroyed by the explosion.
amharic: በጋዛ ከተማ በተፈጸመ የእስራኤል የአየር ጥቃት ቢያንስ 14 ሰዎች ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። የእስራኤል ወታደራዊ ኃይል ጥቃቱ የታለመው የሃማስ አባል ላይ እንደሆነ አስታውቋል። በቦታው የተነሱ ምስሎችም ጥቃቱ አንድ ተሽከርካሪን ሙሉ በሙሉ እንዳወደመው ያሳያሉ።
oromo: Magaalaa Gaazaatti haleellaa xiyyaaraa Israa'el raawwatte kanaan namoonni 14 ol ta'an miidhamaniiru. Mootummaan Israa'el haleellaan kun kan qajjeelfame miseensa dhaabbata Haamaas irratti akka ta'e ibseera. Suuraawwan naannichaa irraa akka hubatamutti, konkolaataan tokko haleellaa kanaan guutummaatti barbadaa'eera.

title: Ten killed as Russian attacks on merchant ships in Black Sea intensify
english: A Russian missile strike on a cargo ship near Odesa has resulted in 10 deaths, marking one of the deadliest recent attacks on civilian maritime vessels. Russia is increasingly targeting ships in the Black Sea to disrupt Ukraine's vital agricultural export routes and discourage international shipping companies. In response, the Ukrainian government is working on new security measures to better protect civilian crews and cargo transit in the region.
amharic: በኦዴሳ አቅራቢያ በሚገኝ የጭነት መርከብ ላይ በደረሰ የሩሲያ የሮኬት ጥቃት 10 ሰዎች መሞታቸው ተገለጸ። ሩሲያ የዩክሬንን የግብርና ምርቶች ወደ ውጭ የመላክ እንቅስቃሴ ለማስተጓጎል እና ዓለም አቀፍ ኩባንያዎችን ለማስፈራራት በጥቁር ባሕር ላይ ያሉ መርከቦችን እያጠቃች ነው። ለዚህም ምላሽ የዩክሬን መንግሥት በባሕር ላይ የሚንቀሳቀሱ ሲቪል መርከቦችን እና የሠራተኞቻቸውን ደኅንነት ለመጠበቅ አዳዲስ የጥበቃ ሥራዎችን እየጀመረ ነው።
oromo: Humni Ruusiyaa markaba fe'umsaa kan Odesaa biratti argamu irratti xiyyaaraan haleellaa raawwateen namoonni 10 du'aniiru. Ruusiyaan daandii gurgurtaa oomisha qonnaa kan Yukreen addaan kutuuf akkasumas warreen oomisha kana bitatan sodaachisuuf jecha dooniiwwan galaana gurraacha keessa jiran irratti haleellaa cimaa gaggeessaa jirti. Mootummaan Yukreenis haleellaa kanaan booda dooniiwwan sivilii fi hojjattoota isaanii balaa irraa eeguuf tattaaffii addaa eegaleera.

title: Hamas names Khalil al-Hayya as new overall leader
english: Hamas has officially appointed Khalil al-Hayya as its new leader, filling the vacancy left by the death of Yahya Sinwar. Previously serving as the group's chief negotiator, al-Hayya is expected to maintain a firm political stance while overseeing the organization during a period of significant conflict. He secured the position after a competitive internal election against former leader Khaled Meshaal.
amharic: ሀማስ የያህያ ሲንዋርን ሞት ተከትሎ ካሊል አል-ሀያን አዲሱ መሪ አድርጎ መርጧል። ቀደም ሲል የቡድኑ ዋና ድርድር አቅራቢ የነበሩት አል-ሀያ፣ አሁን ባለው የጦርነት ጊዜ ቡድኑን በጽኑ የፖለቲካ አቋም እንደሚመሩ ይጠበቃል። ይህንን የስልጣን ቦታ ያገኙትም የቀድሞ መሪ ካሌድ መሻልን በውስጥ ምርጫ ካሸነፉ በኋላ ነው።
oromo: Hamas hoogganaa isaa kan duraanii Yahya Sinwar erga ajjeefamee booda, Khalil al-Hayya hoogganaa haaraa godhatee muudeera. Al-Hayyaan kanaan dura mari'achiisaa guddaa garee kanaa turan, amma immoo yeroo waraana cimaa kana keessatti adeemsa siyaasaa garee kanaa gaggeessuun isaan irraa eegama. Al-Hayyaan bakka kana kan argatan filannoo keessoo irratti hoogganaa duraanii Khaled Meshaal injifachuun isaanii booda.

title: Ebola death toll in DRC surges to at least 930 as outbreak gathers pace
english: The Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo has reached a critical stage, with the death toll rising to at least 930 people and confirmed cases exceeding 2,300. The virus is spreading at an unprecedented speed, significantly faster than any previous epidemic recorded in the region. Efforts to control the disease are further complicated by healthcare worker strikes and the difficulty of tracking transmission chains in affected areas.
amharic: በኮንጎ ዲሞክራቲክ ሪፐብሊክ የተከሰተው የኢቦላ ወረርሽኝ አሳሳቢ ደረጃ ላይ የደረሰ ሲሆን፣ የሟቾች ቁጥር ቢያንስ 930 መድረሱን እና የተጠቂዎች ቁጥር ከ2,300 በላይ መሆኑን ሪፖርቶች ያመለክታሉ። ቫይረሱ በአገሪቱ ታሪክ ታይቶ በማይታወቅ ፍጥነት እየተስፋፋ ይገኛል። የጤና ባለሙያዎች ለሚያደርጉት አድማ እና የበሽታውን ስርጭት ለመቆጣጠር በሚደረገው ጥረት ላይ ያለው ተግዳሮት ሁኔታውን ይበልጥ ውስብስብ አድርጎታል።
oromo: Dhibeen vaayirasii Ebola biyya Rippabiliika Dimookiraatawaa Koongoo keessatti babal’achaa jiru lubbuu namoota 930 ol galaafatee jira, lakkoofsi namoota qabamanii immoo 2,300 irra ga’ee jira. Vaayirasichi saffisa kanaan dura mul’atee hin beekneen babal’achaa jiraachuun isaa sodaa guddaa uumee jira. Hojjettoonni fayyaa gaaffii mindaa dhiyeessuun hojii dhaabuu fi hanqinni to’annoo vaayirasichaa yaaliin fayyaa akka hin milkoofne gufuu ta’ee jira.

title: Andy Burnham pledges end to political instability as he becomes UK PM
english: Andy Burnham has officially become the United Kingdom's seventh prime minister in ten years after replacing Keir Starmer. In his first speech, he promised to stop the cycle of political instability and introduce significant economic and social reforms. He also pledged immediate action to address the cost-of-living crisis and committed to maintaining strong support for Ukraine.
amharic: አንዲ በራም በያዝነው አሥር ዓመት ውስጥ የዩናይትድ ኪንግደም ሰባተኛው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር በመሆን ኪር ስታርመርን ተክተዋል። በመጀመሪያ ንግግራቸውም ሀገሪቱን እያመሰ ያለውን የፖለቲካ አለመረጋጋት ለማቆም እና ትልቅ የኢኮኖሚና የማህበራዊ ለውጦችን ለማምጣት ቃል ገብተዋል። በተጨማሪም የኑሮ ውድነትን ለመቅረፍ ፈጣን እርምጃ እንደሚወስዱና ለዩክሬን ያላቸውን ድጋፍ እንደሚቀጥሉ አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Andii Berneem mootummaa UK keessatti waggoota kudhan keessatti muummicha ministeeraa torbaffaa ta'uun Keer Staarmariin bakka bu'aniiru. Haasaa isaanii jalqabaarratti, tasgabbii dhabuu siyaasaa biyyattii keessatti mul'achaa jiru dhaabsisuufi jijjiirama dinagdee fi hawaasummaa guddaa fiduuf waadaa galaniiru. Akkasumas, rakkoo gatii jireenyaa fooyyessuuf tarkaanfii ariifachiisaa fudhachuufi deeggarsa yeroo dheeraa Yuukreeniif qaban itti fufsiisuuf beeksisaniiru.

title: What are ‘civilian’ sites in international law and where have US, Iran hit?
english: The United States and Iran have resumed military hostilities, with both sides striking critical infrastructure like bridges and power plants. These actions have caused significant civilian casualties and raised major concerns regarding violations of international humanitarian law. Despite a previous peace agreement, the ongoing conflict continues to escalate as both nations target key assets to gain strategic control over the Strait of Hormuz.
amharic: አሜሪካ እና ኢራን በድጋሚ ወታደራዊ ግጭት ውስጥ የገቡ ሲሆን ሁለቱም ወገኖች ድልድዮችን እና የኤሌክትሪክ ማመንጫዎችን ጨምሮ ወሳኝ መሰረተ ልማቶች ላይ ጥቃት እየሰነዘሩ ነው። እነዚህ ተግባራት በሲቪል ህዝቡ ላይ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት በማድረሳቸው ዓለም አቀፍ የሰብአዊ ህግ ጥሰት ስጋቶችን ፈጥረዋል። ከዚህ ቀደም የተደረሰው የሰላም ስምምነት በመፍረሱ፣ የሆርሙዝ ባህረ ሰላጤን ለመቆጣጠር በሚደረገው ፉክክር ግጭቱ እየተባባሰ ቀጥሏል።
oromo: Ameerikaan fi Iraan lola waraanaa deebisanii kan jalqaban yoo ta'u, gama lamaanuu bu'uuraalee misoomaa akka daandiiwwanii fi buufataalee humna ibsaa miidhuu irratti argamu. Gochi kun namoota nagaa irratti miidhaa guddaa geessisuun isaa seera namoomaa addunyaa cabsuu ilaalchisee yaaddoo cimaa uumeera. Walii galteen nagaa dura ture waan diigameef, biyyoonni lameen kun karaa Hormuz to'achuuf jecha wal irratti waraana jabeessaa jiru.

title: What we know about US soldiers killed in Iran war, and Iranian casualties
english: A recent explosion involving a downed Iranian drone in northern Iraq resulted in the death of a US service member, bringing the total number of American military fatalities in the ongoing conflict to 17. Since hostilities resumed in early July, both sides have engaged in a series of retaliatory strikes, including recent attacks in Jordan. The US military is currently working to identify remains found at conflict sites while reporting hundreds of additional injuries among its personnel.
amharic: በሰሜን ኢራቅ በተከሰተ የኢራን ድሮን ፍንዳታ አንድ የአሜሪካ ወታደር ሕይወቱ ማለፉን ተከትሎ፣ በጦርነቱ የተገደሉ የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ቁጥር 17 ደርሷል። ከሐምሌ ወር መጀመሪያ ጀምሮ ግጭቱ እንደገና በመቀስቀሱ ሁለቱም ወገኖች በዮርዳኖስን ጨምሮ በተለያዩ አካባቢዎች እርስ በርስ ጥቃት እየሰነዘሩ ይገኛሉ። የአሜሪካ ጦር በግጭቱ ቦታዎች የተገኙ የሟቾች ቅሪቶችን የመለየት ስራ እያከናወነ ሲሆን፣ ከዚህ በተጨማሪም በመቶዎች የሚቆጠሩ ወታደሮች ጉዳት እንደደረሰባቸው አስታውቋል።
oromo: Kaaba Iraaqitti xiyyara malee-balali’u (drone) Iraan kufuun walqabatee dhuka’a uumameen loltuun Ameerikaa tokko du’eera; kunis lakkoofsa loltoota Ameerikaa waraana kana keessatti du’anii gara 17tti ol guddiseera. Iyyuu erga ji’a Adoolessaatti waraanni kun deebi’ee qabatee as, Ameerikaanii fi Iraan gamaa gamanaatti weerara walirratti geggeessaa jiru. Waraanni Ameerikaa bakkeewwan waraanaa kanatti reeffawwan argaman adda baasuuf hojjechaa jiru yoo ta’u, loltoonni dhibbaan lakka’aman immoo miidhamuun ibsameera.

title: Khalil al-Hayya: Who is the political veteran chosen to steer Hamas forward
english: Hamas has officially selected Khalil al-Hayya as the new leader of its political bureau following a close internal vote. He takes over the leadership role after the deaths of former commanders Ismail Haniyeh and Yahya Sinwar. This appointment signals the group's attempt to stabilize its command structure and continue its political operations amidst ongoing regional conflict.
amharic: ሀማስ ካሊል አል-ሃያን የፖለቲካ ቢሮው አዲሱ መሪ አድርጎ በውስጥ ምርጫ በጠባብ ድምፅ መርጧል። አል-ሃያ ቦታውን የተረከቡት የቀድሞዎቹ መሪዎች እስማኤል ሀኒዬ እና ያህያ ሲንዋር ከተገደሉ በኋላ ነው። ይህ ሹመት ቡድኑ በአካባቢው እየተካሄደ ባለው ጦርነት መካከል የአመራር መዋቅሩን ለማጠናከር የሚያደርገውን ጥረት ያሳያል።
oromo: Hamaas nama muuxannoo qabu Khaliil al-Hayyaan hogganaa biiroo siyaasaa isaa haaraa godhee filateera. Inni bakka bu'oota duraanii kan turan Ismaa'eel Haaniyyaa fi Yahya Siinwaar ajjeefamuu hordofee hogganummaa fudhateera. Muudamni kun gareen sun waraana naannichaa keessatti caasaa hogganummaa isaa cimsuuf carraaqqii gochaa jiru kan agarsiisuudha.

title: France warns of consequences after Iranian security services detain embassy staff
english: France has condemned Iran after two of its embassy staff were detained, interrogated, and physically assaulted by Iranian security forces without cause. Foreign Minister Jean-Noel Barrot described the incident as a severe violation of diplomatic immunity and warned that Iran will face repercussions. The French government considers these actions against its personnel completely unacceptable.
amharic: ፈረንሳይ በቴህራን የሚገኙ የኤምባሲዋ ሁለት ሰራተኞች ያለ አግባብ ታስረው፣ ተጠይቀውና አካላዊ ጥቃት እንደተፈጸመባቸው በመግለጽ ኢራንን አውግዛለች። የፈረንሳይ የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር ዣን-ኖኤል ባሮት ይህ ድርጊት የዲፕሎማሲያዊ መብቶችን የጣሰና ተቀባይነት የሌለው መሆኑን በመጥቀስ፣ ኢራን ለዚህ ተጠያቂ እንደምትሆን አስታውቀዋል። ፈረንሳይ በዲፕሎማቶችዋ ላይ የተፈጸመውን ይህን ድርጊት እጅግ አሳሳቢ ጉዳይ እንደሆነ እየተመለከተችው ትገኛለች።
oromo: Faransaayiin hojjettoonni imbaasii ishee lama Tehran keessatti humnoota nageenyaa Iraaniin sababa malee hidhamuu, gaaffiif dhiyaachuu fi miidhaa qaamaa irra gahuu isaanii erga beektee booda mormii cimaa dhiheessiteetti. Ministirri Dhimmi Alaa Faransaay, Jean-Noel Barrot, gochi kun mirga dippilomaasummaa sarbuu fi kan hin fudhatamne ta'uu ibsuun, Iraan tarkaanfiif akka saaxilamtu akeekkachiisaniiru. Mootummaan Faransaay qondaaltota isaa irratti kan raawwatame gocha kana akka balaa guddaatti ilaala.

title: Former UN oversight chief says ICC prosecutor Karim Khan is ‘victim of massive stitch-up’
english: Ben Swanson, a former UN official, has criticized the International Criminal Court’s decision to suspend prosecutor Karim Khan, labeling the move a deliberate setup. Swanson argues that the governing body ignored an independent judicial panel's findings, which had previously cleared Khan of any wrongdoing. He expressed deep concern that this process was biased and suggests that justice is unlikely to be served under the current circumstances.
amharic: የቀድሞው የተባበሩት መንግስታት ከፍተኛ ባለስልጣን ቤን ስዋንሰን፣ የአለም አቀፍ የወንጀለኞች ፍርድ ቤት አቃቤ ህግ ከሪም ካንን ከስራ ማገዱን ተችተው፣ ሂደቱ ሆን ተብሎ የተጠነሰሰ ሴራ ነው ሲሉ ገልጸውታል። ስዋንሰን እንዳሉት ፍርድ ቤቱ ቀደም ሲል አቃቤ ህጉን ከጥፋተኝነት ነጻ ያደረገውን ገለልተኛ የዳኞች ውሳኔ ችላ ብሎታል። አሁን የተካሄደው የእገዳ እርምጃ ሚዛናዊ እንዳልሆነ እና ፍትህ እንደሚጓደል ስጋታቸውን ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Hoggantoonni duraanii kan dhaabbata Mootummoota Gamtoomanii Ben Swanson jedhaman, murtoo mana murtii yakka addunyaa kan qorataa yakka Karim Khan irratti fudhatame balaaleffataniiru. Swanson akka jedhanitti, qorataan kun gocha sirrii hin taane raawwateera jedhamee himatame kun xaxaa siyaasaa ta'uu ibsaniiru. Kana dura qaamni seeraa walaba ta'e tokko Karim Khan yakka irraa bilisa ta'uu isaa mirkaneessee osoo jiruu, murtoon amma fudhatame garuu kana kan diiguudha jedhaniiru.

title: Iranian official reports US attack on Shiraz
english: A local government official in Iran has claimed that the United States conducted an airstrike in the city of Shiraz on Monday. According to the report, the attack did not lead to any deaths or injuries. Officials confirmed that the incident is now being managed and the local situation remains stable.
amharic: የኢራን የፋርስ ግዛት ምክትል ገዥ ሰኞ ዕለት በአሜሪካ የተፈጸመ የአየር ድብደባ በሺራዝ ከተማ መድረሱን አስታውቀዋል። በዘገባው መሰረት ጥቃቱ ምንም አይነት የሰው ህይወት አልቀጠፈም ወይም ጉዳት አላደረሰም። ባለስልጣናቱ ሁኔታው በአሁኑ ወቅት ቁጥጥር ስር መሆኑን እና አካባቢው ሰላማዊ እንደሆነ ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Hoggantoonni mootummaa naannoo Fars kan Iran akka jedhanitti, guyyaa Wiixataa magaala Shiraz keessatti Ameerikaan haleellaa qilleensa irraa raawwatteetti. Gabaasni akka ibsutti, haleellaa kanaan miidhaan lubbuu fi qaamaa namoota irra hin ga'e. Hoggantoonni kunneen haalli amma to'annoo jala akka jiru fi nagaa akka ta'e mirkaneessaniiru.

title: Sirens sound in Bahrain for fifth time
english: Bahrain has activated its emergency warning sirens for the fifth time today following Iranian military strikes. The government reports that these attacks targeted facilities used for drone maintenance and repair. Authorities have advised all citizens and residents to stay calm and seek cover in secure locations immediately.
amharic: በኢራን በተፈጸመ ጥቃት ምክንያት የባህሬን የድንገተኛ ጊዜ ማስጠንቀቂያ ሳይረን ለአምስተኛ ጊዜ ተሰምቷል። የሀገሪቱ የውስጥ ጉዳይ ሚኒስቴር ጥቃቱ ድሮን መጠገኛ እና ጥገና ማዕከላት ላይ ያነጣጠረ መሆኑን ገልጿል። መንግስት ዜጎች እና ነዋሪዎች መረጋጋታቸውን ጠብቀው በአቅራቢያቸው ወደሚገኝ አስተማማኝ ቦታ እንዲጠለሉ አሳስቧል።
oromo: Humni waraana Iraan haleellaa raawwateen walqabatee, biyyi Bahareyn sagalee akeekkachiisaa yeroo shanaffaaf dhageessiseetti. Ministeerri dhimma keessaa biyyattii akka ibsetti, haleellaan kun buufataalee xiyyoona malee (drone) itti suphaman irratti kan xiyyeeffate ta'uu beeksiseera. Mootummaan lammiileen fi jiraattonni nagaa isaanii eeggatanii bakka nagaa qabuutti akka qubatan akeekkachiiseera.

title: Police block thousands of 'cockroach' protesters marching on India's parliament
english: Thousands of protesters, led by the youth-driven Cockroach Janta Party, marched in Delhi to demand the Indian education minister's resignation following widespread exam paper scandals. Security forces blocked their path to parliament, resulting in minor clashes and reports of injuries. The movement, which has gained national attention, expresses growing public dissatisfaction with the government and solidarity with activist Sonam Wangchuk.
amharic: የህንድ የትምህርት ሚኒስትር በፈተና ወረቀት መፍሰስ ቅሌት ምክንያት ስልጣናቸውን እንዲለቁ የሚጠይቁ በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ተቃዋሚዎች በዴልሂ ሰላማዊ ሰልፍ አድርገዋል። በወጣቶች የተመራው ይህ ንቅናቄ ወደ ፓርላማ ህንፃ ለመድረስ ቢሞክርም በፖሊስ ታግዷል፣ ይህም በአካባቢው ግጭት አስነስቷል። ለሳምንታት የዘለቀው ይህ የተቃውሞ እንቅስቃሴ በአሁኑ ወቅት በመንግስት ላይ ያለውን ህዝባዊ ቅሬታ በግልፅ እያሳየ ይገኛል።
oromo: Hiriirri mormii guddaan magaalaa Deelhii keessatti geggeeffamee, barattoonniifi deggartoonni 'Cockroach Janta Party' jedhamu ministeerri barnootaa Indiyaa aangoorraa akka bu'an gaafataniiru. Poolisoonni hiriirtota gara mana maree (parlaamaa) deemaniif daandii cufuudhaan walitti buiinsi xiqqoon akka uumamu ta'eera. Mormiin kun rakkoo qormaata barnootaa fi mormii mootummaa irratti xiyyeeffatu yoo ta'u, erga dhaabbileen kun beekamtii argatee as gaaffiin ummataa daran dabalaa dhufeera.

title: Scores feared dead after passenger ferry capsizes off Guyana
english: A passenger ferry named MV Barima capsized off the coast of Guyana on Saturday, leaving many people missing and feared dead. While 67 survivors have been rescued, officials believe the passenger list was inaccurate, meaning more people may have been on board than reported. Authorities have detained the captain and crew members after testing positive for drugs, and a formal investigation is underway to determine if negligence led to the disaster.
amharic: በጉያና የባህር ዳርቻ ላይ MV Barima የተባለ የሳንቲም መርከብ ቅዳሜ ዕለት በመገለባበጡ ብዙ ሰዎች የጠፉ ሲሆን የሞቱ ሰዎችም እንደሚኖሩ ተሰግቷል። 67 ሰዎች በሕይወት ቢድኑም፣ የመንገደኞች ዝርዝር ትክክለኛ ባለመሆኑ ከተዘገበው በላይ ብዙ ሰዎች በመርከቡ ላይ እንደነበሩ ተገምቷል። መንግሥት የመርከቧ ካፒቴን እና ሠራተኞች በአደንዛዥ እፅ ምርመራው አዎንታዊ ሆነው በመገኘታቸው በቁጥጥር ስር ውለዋል፣ እንዲሁም ድርጊቱ በቸልተኝነት የተፈጠረ መሆኑን ለማረጋገጥ ምርመራ እየተካሄደ ነው።
oromo: Guyana keessatti dooniin imaltootaa MV Barima jedhamu tokko erga gombifamee booda namoonni hedduun badaniiru lubbuun isaaniis darbeera jedhamee sodaatama. Namoonni 67 lubbuun kan ooran yoo ta'u, maqaan imaltootaa galmaa'e dhugaa waan hin taaneef, namoonni meeqa akka jiranii fi akka miidhaman mirkaneeffachuun rakkisaa ta'eera. Qondaaltonni biyyattii gitaa fi hojjettoota isaa qorannoo qoricha sammuu hadoochuun booda qabaniiru, akkasumas balaan kun tuffii fi hanqina hojii irraa kan dhufe ta'uu isaa qorachuuf qorannoon eegalameera.

title: Petro to give farewell speech amid Colombia transfer-of-power tensions
english: Outgoing Colombian President Gustavo Petro is preparing to deliver a final farewell address during nationwide protests scheduled for Independence Day. These demonstrations coincide with ongoing disputes regarding the integrity of last month’s close election, which Petro claims was compromised by foreign interference. Additionally, a disagreement has emerged regarding the inauguration site for the president-elect, as Petro has blocked plans to hold the ceremony at a military base.
amharic: የኮሎምቢያው ወጪ ፕሬዝዳንት ጉስታቮ ፔትሮ በነጻነት ቀን በሚካሄድ ሀገራዊ የተቃውሞ ሰልፍ ላይ የመሰናበቻ ንግግር ለማድረግ ተዘጋጅተዋል። እነዚህ ተቃውሞዎች ባለፈው ወር የተካሄደውን አወዛጋቢ ምርጫ ውጤት በመቃወም እና የምርጫውን ሂደት በውጭ ጣልቃ ገብነት የተበላሸ ነው በሚል የሚካሄዱ ናቸው። በሌላ በኩል ፔትሮ ተመራጩ ፕሬዝዳንት ሥልጣኑን በወታደራዊ ካምፕ እንዲረከቡ ያቀረቡትን ጥያቄ ውድቅ በማድረግ፣ የሥልጣን ሽግግሩ በፓርላማ መከናወን እንዳለበት አጥብቀው ተቃውመዋል።
oromo: Pirezedantiin Kolombiyaa aangoo gadi lakkisaa jiran Gustaavoo Peetiroo, guyyaa walabaa biyyattii irratti hiriira gaggeeffamu irratti haasaa gaggeessaa gochuuf qophaa'aa jiru. Hiriirri kun kan qophaa'e filannoo ji'a darbe gaggeeffame irratti shakkiin walqabatee fi mootummaan Peetiroo filannicha keessa harka galchituu biyya alaa jiraachuu akka jiru amanuun walqabatee dha. Akkasumas, pirezedantiin haaraan aangoo fudhatan eebba isaanii buufata waraanaa keessatti gaggeeffachuuf karoorfatanii turan yoo ta'u, Peetiroo akkaataa seeraa qabatee eebbi kun mana maree keessatti akka raawwatamu ajajuun mormanii jiru.

title: Israeli ministers and settlers call for return to Gaza settlements
english: A large group of Israeli settlers, government ministers, and lawmakers gathered near the Gaza border to advocate for the re-establishment of Jewish settlements in the territory. This demonstration highlights a growing political movement within Israel that supports retaking and resettling the area. The event underscores the intensifying debate regarding the future control and presence of Israelis in Gaza.
amharic: የእስራኤል ሰፋሪዎች፣ የመንግስት ሚኒስትሮች እና የፓርላማ አባላት በጋዛ ድንበር አቅራቢያ በመሰባሰብ በአካባቢው የሰፈራ ፕሮግራሞችን እንደገና እንዲጀምሩ ጥሪ አቅርበዋል። ይህ ሰልፍ በእስራኤል ፖለቲካ ውስጥ ጋዛን መልሶ ለመያዝ እና ሰዎችን ለማስፈር እየጨመረ የመጣውን እንቅስቃሴ የሚያሳይ ነው። ድርጊቱ በአካባቢው የወደፊት ዕጣ ፈንታ እና በእስራኤላውያን መገኘት ዙሪያ ያለውን ውዝግብ ይበልጥ አባብሶታል።
oromo: Hiriirri guddaan kan gaggeeffame yoo ta'u, keessattuu namoonni biyyee fudhatanii qubataniifi ministiroonni mootummaa Israa'el Gazaatti deebi'anii qubachuuf gaaffii dhiyeessaniiru. Sochiin kun siyaasa Israa'el keessatti bakka sanatti deebi'anii qubachuuf fedhiin jiru dabalaa akka dhufe kan agarsiisuudha. Gochi kun gara fuulduraatti bulchiinsa Gazaafi qubannaa Israa'elii irratti mariin jiru caalaatti akka cimaa dhufe kan mirkaneessudha.

title: Burnham’s move to scrap UK’s digital ID plans earns cheers and criticism
english: New UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham has officially canceled the country's controversial digital ID program, known as BritCard. While the government will continue to digitize public services, it has abandoned the universal identification scheme due to significant public opposition and high implementation costs. The billions of pounds originally earmarked for the project will now be redirected to address the cost-of-living crisis for citizens.
amharic: የእንግሊዝ አዲሱ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አንዲ በርንሃም ብሪትካርድ በመባል የሚታወቀውን አወዛጋቢ የዲጂታል መታወቂያ ፕሮግራም በይፋ ሰርዘዋል። መንግስት የህዝብ አገልግሎቶችን በዲጂታል መንገድ ማዘመኑን ቢቀጥልም፣ በህዝብ ተቃውሞ እና በከፍተኛ ወጪ ምክንያት አጠቃላይ የዲጂታል መታወቂያ እቅዱን ትቶታል። ለዚህ ፕሮግራም ተመድቦ የነበረው በቢሊዮኖች የሚቆጠር ገንዘብ ለኑሮ ውድነት መፍትሄ ወደ መስጠት ተግባራት እንዲዛወር ተወስኗል።
oromo: Mummichi Ministeeraa UK haaraan Andy Burnham sagantaa waraqaa eenyummaa dijitaala kan BritCard jedhamu fi mormii guddaa kaase ture haqeera. Mootummaan tajaajiloota mootummaa dijitaalatti jijjiiruu itti fufuus, mormii uummataa fi baasii guddaa irraa kan ka'e qophii eenyummaa dijitaala waliigalaa kana dhaabeera. Maallaqni biliyoonaan lakkaa'amu kan pirojektichaaf ramadamee ture, ammayyuu rakkoo gatii jireenyaa hir’isuuf akka oolu murtaa'eera.

title: Why Palestinians in Gaza are celebrating Spain’s World Cup win
english: Many Palestinians in Gaza came together to watch the World Cup final and cheered for Spain's victory. They chose to support the Spanish team as a sign of gratitude for Spain's stance regarding the ongoing conflict in Gaza. This celebration served as a public expression of appreciation for the country's perceived solidarity with their cause.
amharic: በጋዛ የሚገኙ በርካታ ፍልስጤማውያን የዓለም ዋንጫን ፍጻሜ ለመመልከት ተሰባስበው ለስፔን አሸናፊነት ድጋፋቸውን ሰጥተዋል። የስፔን ቡድንን የደገፉትም በጋዛ እየተካሄደ ባለው ጦርነት ወቅት አገሪቱ ለፍልስጤማውያን ላሳየችው አቋም ያላቸውን ምስጋና ለመግለጽ ነው። ይህ ድጋፍ አገሪቱ ለችግራቸው ላሳየችው አጋርነት ያላቸውን አድናቆት የሚያንጸባርቅ ነበር።
oromo: Palestinoonni Gaazaa keessa jiraatan hedduun tapha xumuraa Waancaa Addunyaa waliin hordofuun injifannoo Ispeen gammachuun simataniiru. Ispeen waraana Gaazaa keessatti geggeeffamaa jiru ilaalchisee dhaabbannoo isheen qabduuf galata galchuuf jecha garee biyyattii deggeraniiru. Gammachuun kun, biyyattiin rakkoo isaanii hubachuun waan isaan cina dhaabbatteef kan isaan qalbii isaanii ibsataniidha.

title: Who is Khalil al-Hayya, Hamas’s newly elected political chief?
english: Hamas has appointed Khalil al-Hayya as its new political leader following the death of former chief Yahya Sinwar. Al-Hayya, a long-time negotiator and senior official, was selected by the group's Shura Council to lead until the next electoral cycle in 2027. His appointment maintains the organization's internal structure for balancing regional leadership across Gaza, the West Bank, and the diaspora.
amharic: ሃማስ የቀድሞ መሪውን ያህያ ሲንዋርን መገደል ተከትሎ ካሊል አል-ሃያን አዲሱ የፖለቲካ ቢሮ ኃላፊ አድርጎ መርጧል። ለረጅም ጊዜ በድርጅቱ ውስጥ በከፍተኛ ቦታዎች ላይ የቆዩት አል-ሃያ፣ በቡድኑ የሹራ ምክር ቤት ተመርጠው እስከ 2027 ድረስ እንዲመሩ ተወስኗል። ይህ ሹመት ድርጅቱ በጋዛ፣ በምዕራብ ባንክ እና በውጭ የሚገኙ አባላትን ያካተተውን የአመራር መዋቅር ለመጠበቅ ያለመ ነው።
oromo: Hamas hoogganaa isaanii duraanii Yahya Sinwar erga ajjeefamanii booda, Khalil al-Hayyaan geggeessaa biiroo siyaasaa haaraa godhataniiru. Al-Hayyaan gorsaa fi miseensa olaanaa dhaabbatichaa kan turan yoo ta'u, Koreen Shuraa isaan filachuun hanga bara 2027 akka hoogganan murteessaniiru. Filannoon kun caasaa dhaabbatichi bakkeewwan Gaza, West Bank fi alaa walitti fiduuf qabu kan eegsisuudha.

title: Boy, 13, dies during World Cup celebrations in Spain
english: A 13-year-old boy tragically died and two others were injured after a fountain structure collapsed in Spain during celebrations for the national team's World Cup victory. The incident occurred in Ciudad Rodrigo when fans climbed onto the fountain, causing a part of it to break. Local authorities have launched an investigation into the accident and are providing support to the affected families.
amharic: ስፔን የዓለም ዋንጫን በማሸነፏ ምክንያት ደስታቸውን ሲገልጹ የነበሩ የ13 ዓመት ታዳጊ በአሳዛኝ ሁኔታ ህይወቱ አልፏል። በሲውዳድ ሮድሪጎ ከተማ ደጋፊዎች በውኃ ማጠራቀሚያ ገንዳ (ፋውንቴን) ላይ በመውጣታቸው መዋቅሩ በመፍረሱ ሁለት ሌሎች ሰዎችም ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። የአካባቢው ባለስልጣናት በአደጋው ላይ ምርመራ እየጀመሩ ሲሆን ለተጎጂው ቤተሰቦች አስፈላጊውን ድጋፍ እያደረጉ ይገኛል።
oromo: Ispeeniin mo'achuu waancaa addunyaatiin walqabatee gammachuu isaanii ibsachaa kan turan dargaggoon umuriin isaanii waggaa 13 ta'e tokko balaa mudateen lubbuun darbeera. Magaala Siwudaad Rodirigoo keessatti, namoonni gammachuu isaanii ibsachuuf koraa bishaanirratti ba'anii turan keessaa qaamni koraa sun jigeetiin namoonni biroo lama miidhamaniiru. Aangeyyonni naannichaa balaa kana ilaalchisee qorannoo eegaleera akkasumas maatii miidhaan irra ga'eef deeggarsa barbaachisu gochaa jiru.

title: Trump says US strikes hit Iran in 'honour' of American soldiers killed
english: President Trump announced that recent U.S. military strikes against Iran were conducted to honor three American soldiers who were recently killed in Iraq and Jordan. The U.S. military has targeted various Iranian military facilities and communication networks to curb attacks on vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. In retaliation, Iran has launched its own strikes in the region, leading to a tense cycle of military activity that threatens regional shipping routes.
amharic: ፕሬዚዳንት ትራምፕ በኢራን ላይ የተፈጸሙት የአሜሪካ ጥቃቶች በቅርቡ በኢራቅ እና በዮርዳኖስ ለተገደሉ ሶስት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች መታሰቢያ እንደሆኑ ተናግረዋል። አሜሪካ በሆርሙዝ ባህር ላይ የሚደረጉ ጥቃቶችን ለመግታት የኢራንን ወታደራዊ ጣቢያዎች እና የመገናኛ መረቦች ኢላማ አድርጋለች። በምላሹም ኢራን በክልሉ ውስጥ የራሷን ጥቃት የከፈተች ሲሆን ይህም በቀጣናው የንግድ መርከቦች ላይ ስጋት የፈጠረ የሁለቱ ሀገራት ግጭት እንዲቀጥል አድርጓል።
oromo: Pirezidaanti Tiraamp, tarkaanfiin waraanaa Amerikaan Iiraan irratti fudhatte ajjeechaa loltoota Amerikaa sadii kanneen dhiyeenya Iiraaq fi Yoordaanos keessatti ajjeefamaniif yaadannoo ta'uu ibsaniiru. Ameerikaan rakkoo dooniiwwan irratti Hormuz keessatti mudatu hir'isuuf jecha buufataalee waraanaa fi sagalee qaxxaamuraa Iiraan irratti xiyyeeffattee rukuttee jirti. Iiraan gama ishiitiin tarkaanfii deebii kenniteen, walitti bu'iinsi biyyoota lamaanii kun naannichatti nageenya dooniiwwanii fi walitti dhufeenya biyyootaa irratti sodaa uumee jira.

title: Why is Iran bombing Gulf states while avoiding US naval assets and Israel?
english: Iran is currently attacking civilian and military infrastructure in Gulf nations rather than engaging directly with U.S. naval forces or Israel. Analysts believe Tehran is using this strategy to pressure the U.S. administration while avoiding a potentially devastating direct military retaliation from American naval fleets. Iran justifies these strikes by claiming that these neighboring countries are facilitating U.S. military operations, a claim that Gulf states consistently deny.
amharic: ኢራን ከአሜሪካ የባህር ኃይል ወይም ከእስራኤል ጋር በቀጥታ ከመጋጨት ይልቅ በባህረ ሰላጤው አገራት በሚገኙ ሲቪል እና ወታደራዊ መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ ጥቃት እየሰነዘረች ነው። ይህ ስልት በአሜሪካ ላይ ጫና ለመፍጠር ያለመ ቢሆንም፣ ከባህር ኃይል ጋር የሚደረግ ቀጥተኛ ግጭት የሚያስከትለውን ከፍተኛ አደጋ ለመሸሽ ታስቦ የተዘጋጀ እንደሆነ ተንታኞች ይገልጻሉ። ኢራን እነዚህን ጥቃቶች የምታጸድቀው ጎረቤት አገራቱ የአሜሪካን ወታደራዊ እንቅስቃሴዎች እያመቻቹ ነው በሚል ክስ ነው፤ ሆኖም አገራቱ ይህንን ውንጀላ ውድቅ አድርገውታል።
oromo: Iraan humnoota galaana Ameerikaa ykn Israa'el wajjin kallattiin walitti bu'uu irra, biyyoota naannoo Ganaatti miidhaa buufataalee waraanaa fi siivilii irratti xiyyeeffachaa jirti. Akka xiinxaltootatti, mala kana kan fayyadamtuuf dhiibbaa mootummaa Ameerikaa irratti uumuuf yoo ta'u, haleellaa diinagdee fi lola kallattii humnoota galaana Ameerikaa irraa dhufuu danda'u irraa of qusachuufi. Iraan haleellaa kana kanneen raawwattu biyyoonni ollaas kunneen hojii waraanaa Ameerikaa deeggaru jedhee himachuun yoo ta'u, biyyoonni naannichaa himannaa kana guutummaatti haalaniiru.

title: Photos: Police fire tear gas at India’s Cockroach movement supporters
english: Protesters from the youth-led Cockroach Janta Party clashed with police in New Delhi while marching toward Parliament to demand the resignation of India's education minister. The movement, which uses satire to address issues like recent government exam leaks and youth unemployment, has grown significantly in response to these systemic failures. Demonstrators are now calling for major reforms to the testing process and justice for students affected by the recent scandals.
amharic: በህንድ ዋና ከተማ ኒው ዴልሂ የ'ኮክሮች ጃንታ ፓርቲ' አባላት የሆኑ ወጣቶች የትምህርት ሚኒስትሩ ስልጣናቸውን እንዲለቁ በመጠየቅ ወደ ፓርላማ ሊዘምቱ ሲሞክሩ ከፖሊስ ጋር ተጋጭተዋል። ይህ የወጣቶች ንቅናቄ በመንግስት ፈተናዎች ላይ የተከሰተውን የስርቆት ወንጀል እና የስራ አጥነት ችግርን በመቃወም ተቃውሞ እያሰሙ ይገኛሉ። ተቃዋሚዎቹ የፈተና አሰጣጥ ስርዓቱ እንዲሻሻል እና ለተጎዱ ተማሪዎች ተገቢው ካሳ እንዲሰጥ እየጠየቁ ነው።
oromo: Indiyaa, magaalaa Niiu Deelhiitti gareen dargaggootaa 'Cockroach Janta Party' jedhamu, ministeerri barnootaa aangoo gadhiisuu qaba jechuun gara mana maree biyyattiitti imaluu yaalanii poolisii waliin walitti bu'an. Sochii kana kan uumaniif rakkoo qormaata mootummaa fi dhabeeyyii ta'uu isaanii erga ta'ee as, mootummaan jijjiirama cimaa akka fidu gaafataa jiru. Dargaggoonni kun sirni qormaataa akka fooyya'u fi barattoota miidhamanifis haqni akka argamuuf iyyata isaanii dhageessisaa jiru.

title: ‘I go with a smile’ says outgoing UK PM Keir Starmer in final speech
english: Keir Starmer has officially stepped down as the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom, stating that he feels his mission is complete. In his farewell address in London, he expressed that he is leaving his position with a sense of satisfaction. Andy Burnham has been appointed as the new leader of the Labour Party and will succeed Starmer as the country's Prime Minister.
amharic: ኬር ስታርመር የተባበሩት መንግሥታት የጠቅላይ ሚኒስትርነት ሥልጣናቸውን በይፋ ለቀዋል። በለንደን ባደረጉት የመሰናበቻ ንግግር፣ የተጣለባቸውን ኃላፊነት በመወጣታቸው ደስተኛ እንደሆኑ ገልጸዋል። አንዲ በርንሃም የሌበር ፓርቲ አዲሱ መሪ በመሆን የስታርመርን ቦታ በመረከብ አዲሱ የሀገሪቱ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሆነዋል።
oromo: Keir Starmer pirezidaantii biyya Ingiliz ta'uudhaan hojii isaa xumureera. Innis Londonitti haasawaa gaggeessaa godheen, hojiin isaa guutummaatti xumuramuu isaa fi gammachuu guddaadhaan aangoo gadhiisuu isaa ibseera. Andy Burnham hoogganaa haaraa paartii Labour ta'uun, bakka Starmer bu'uun pirezidaantii biyyattii ta'ee muudameera.

title: Hamas names Khalil al-Hayya as new leader after run-off with Khaled Meshaal
english: Hamas has officially appointed Khalil al-Hayya as its new leader following an internal vote. He secured the position after a run-off against former leader Khaled Meshaal. Al-Hayya replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by the Israeli military in Gaza in October 2024.
amharic: ሀማስ ካሊል አል-ሃያን አዲሱ መሪው አድርጎ መርጧል። ይህ ውሳኔ የተላለፈው በቀድሞው መሪ ካሊድ መሻል ላይ በውስጥ ምርጫ ካሸነፉ በኋላ ነው። አል-ሃያ የካቲት 2017 እ.ኤ.አ በእስራኤል ጦር ከተገደሉት ያህያ ሲንዋር በመተካት ነው ይህንን ኃላፊነት የተረከቡት።
oromo: Hamas hoogganaa haaraa isaa godhatee Khalil al-Hayya filateera. Inni kun kan filatame hogganaa duraanii Khaled Meshaal waliin sagalee kenniinsa keessa darbee injifateen boodadha. Al-Hayya bakka Yahya Sinwar kan bara 2024 waraana Israa'eliin ajjeefame bu'ee bakka bu'eera.

title: Jubilation in Spain as La Roja beat Argentina to win second World Cup title
english: Spain celebrated a major victory after defeating Argentina 1-0 during extra time to claim their second World Cup title. Fans across the country took to the streets to mark the win with fireworks and celebrations following the decisive goal by Ferran Torres. The atmosphere remained inclusive in towns like Castelldefels, where local fans and a large Argentinian community watched the match together in honor of Lionel Messi’s long-standing connection to the area.
amharic: ስፔን አርጀንቲናን 1-0 በሆነ ውጤት በጭማሪ ደቂቃ በማሸነፍ ለሁለተኛ ጊዜ የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸናፊ ሆናለች። ይህ ድል መላው ስፔንን በአደባባይ ደስታን እንዲገልጹ ያደረገ ሲሆን፣ የፌራን ቶሬስ ብቸኛ ግብ ለድሉ በቂ ሆናለች። በካስቴልዴፌልስ ከተማ የሚኖሩ የስፔን ደጋፊዎች እና የአርጀንቲና ስደተኞች ሊዮኔል ሜሲ ላላቸው ታሪካዊ ትስስር ክብር ሲባል ጨዋታውን በጋራ በመመልከት አብረው አሳልፈዋል።
oromo: Ispeeniin Arjentiinaa 1-0 yeroo dabalataa irratti injifachuun marsaa lammaffaaf waancaa addunyaa fudhattee jirti. Injifannoo kana booda lammiileen Ispeen karaa irratti ba'uun gammachuu isaanii ibsatanii jiru; galchiin Ferraan Tooresis injifannoo kanaaf murteessaa ture. Magaalaa Kaasteldefeels keessatti, deggertoonni Ispeenii fi aadaa Arjentiinaa kanneen achi jiraatan, hariiroo cimaa Liinoonel Mesii naannicha waliin qabu kabajuuf jechuun taphicha waliin ilaaluun gammachuu isaanii waliin qooddatanii jiru.

title: Top feel-good moments to remember now that the 2026 World Cup is over
english: Despite various controversies and logistical challenges, the 2026 World Cup featured several heartwarming highlights. Notable moments included Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha reuniting with his mother in the US after officials waived her travel fees and young Keyne Yamal capturing hearts with his exuberant celebrations alongside his brother Lamine. These uplifting stories have become the lasting memories of the six-week tournament held across North America.
amharic: የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ በተለያዩ ውዝግቦች እና ፈታኝ ሁኔታዎች የታጀበ ቢሆንም፣ ብዙ አዎንታዊ ገጽታዎችንም አስተናግዷል። ከነዚህም መካከል የኬፕ ቨርዴው ግብ ጠባቂ ቮዚንሃ እናቱ ወደ አሜሪካ መጥተው እንዲያዩት መደረጉ እንዲሁም የላሚን ያማል ታናሽ ወንድም ኬኔ በሜዳ ላይ ያሳያቸው ደስ የሚሉ እንቅስቃሴዎች በሰዎች ዘንድ የማይረሱ ሆነዋል። በሰሜን አሜሪካ ለስድስት ሳምንታት ሲካሄድ የቆየው ይህ ውድድር፣ ከነበሩት ችግሮች ይልቅ በእነዚህ ልብ የሚነኩ ክስተቶች ይታወሳል።
oromo: Waliin gahuun qophii Waancaa Addunyaa bara 2026 rakkoolee fi walitti bu'iinsa garaagaraa keessa kan darbe ta'us, yeroo gammachiisaa fi miira namaa tuqan qabaateera. Keessattuu, eegduun balbala Kaap Verde Vozinha haadha isaa waliin wal arguun isaanii fi obboleessi Lamine Yamal kan ta'e mucaan xiqqoon Keyne, dirree irratti gochaan inni raawwate addunyaa booji'uu danda'eera. Taphoonni kunneen rakkoolee ijoo ta'an hunda hirreeffachuun, ayyaanni kun sammuu namoota hedduu keessatti akka yeroo yaadatamuu qabuutti hafeera.

title: LIVE: Andy Burnham to become UK PM, deliver first speech at 10 Downing
english: Andy Burnham is set to become the next Prime Minister of the United Kingdom, succeeding Keir Starmer. As the leader of the Labour Party, he will be the seventh person to hold this office in the last ten years. His administration plans to prioritize improving public services and addressing the current cost-of-living challenges faced by citizens.
amharic: አንዲ በርንሃም የዩናይትድ ኪንግደም ቀጣዩ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር በመሆን ኬይር ስታርመርን ይተካሉ። የሌበር ፓርቲ መሪ የሆኑት በርንሃም ባለፉት አስር ዓመታት ውስጥ ሰባተኛው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ይሆናሉ። አዲሱ መንግሥት የሕዝብ አገልግሎቶችን በማሻሻል እና በዜጎች ላይ እየደረሰ ያለውን የኑሮ ውድነት ችግር ለመፍታት ትኩረት ሰጥቶ እንደሚሠራ አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Andii Barnhaam Kayer Staarmer bakka bu'uun ministira muummee biyya Ingiliz itti aanu ta'uuf qophiirra jiru. Hogganaan paartii Leebar kun waggaa kudhan darban keessatti namoota torbaffa ta'uun aangoo kan qabataniidha. Mootummaan isaanii tajaajila hawaasummaa fooyyeessuufi rakkoo gatiin jireenyaa dabaluun ummata mudate furuuf xiyyeeffannoo kennuuf karoorfateera.

title: Rubio: US ‘open to diplomacy’ after ninth night of bombing Iran
english: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio stated that the United States remains willing to pursue diplomatic channels following nine consecutive nights of military strikes against Iran. These attacks have intensified following the confirmed deaths of three American soldiers during regional retaliatory actions. Despite the ongoing military campaign, the administration maintains that a peaceful resolution is still a possibility.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር ማርኮ ሩቢዮ፣ አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ ለዘጠኝ ተከታታይ ምሽቶች ወታደራዊ ጥቃት ብትሰነዝርም በዲፕሎማሲያዊ መንገድ ችግሮችን ለመፍታት ዝግጁ መሆኗን ገልጸዋል። ይህ ጥቃት የተፈጸመው በክልሉ በተከሰተ የአጸፋ እርምጃ ሶስት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ከተገደሉ በኋላ ነው። አሜሪካ ወታደራዊ እርምጃውን ብትቀጥልም፣ በድርድር መፍትሄ ለማምጣት ያላት ፍላጎት እንዳልተቀየረ ታውቋል።
oromo: Ministirri Dhimma Alaa Ameerikaa Marko Ruubiyoo, Ameerikaan halkan saglaffaadhaaf Iiraan irratti haleellaa rawwattee iyyuu, rakkinicha karaa dippilomaasiin furuuf fedhii qabaachuu ishee ibsaniiru. Haleellaan kun kan hammaate, haleellaa deebii naannicha keessatti rawwatameen loltoonni Ameerikaa sadii erga du'anii boodadha. Ameerikaan haleellaa waraanaa kanas kan itti fufte ta'us, furmaatni nagaa har'as akka jiru ibsiteetti.

title: Key takeaways from the World Cup 2026 final as Spain beat Argentina
english: Spain secured the 2026 World Cup title after defeating Argentina 1-0 in an intense extra-time match. The Spanish team relied on superior ball possession to control the pace of the game and effectively neutralized Lionel Messi's influence throughout the final. This victory cements Spain's current dominance in world football, as they now hold the World Cup, the Euros, and the Olympic titles simultaneously.
amharic: ስፔን አርጀንቲናን 1 ለ 0 በሆነ ውጤት ተጨማሪ የጨዋታ ጊዜ በማሸነፍ የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸናፊ ሆናለች። የስፔን ብሔራዊ ቡድን የኳስ ቁጥጥር ብልጫን በመጠቀም ጨዋታውን መቆጣጠር የቻሉ ሲሆን ሊዮኔል ሜሲን በውጤታማነት መገደብ ችለዋል። ይህ ድል ስፔን አሁን በአንድ ጊዜ የዓለም ዋንጫ፣ የአውሮፓ ዋንጫ እና የኦሊምፒክ የወርቅ ሜዳሊያ ባለቤት በመሆን በዓለም እግር ኳስ ያላትን የበላይነት አረጋግጣለች።
oromo: Ispeeniin arjentiinaa 1-0 xumura tapha irratti erga injifattee booda, qophii bara 2026 kan ta'e Waancaa Addunyaa injifatteetti. Taphattoonni Ispeen kubbaa to'achuun taphicha hogganuu fi kilabii arjentiinaa keessatti Li'oonel Mesii daangessuun injifannoo argatan. Ispeeniin amma waancaa addunyaa, waancaa Yuurooppii fi medalii olompikii waliin harkatti galchuun, idil-addunyaatti sadarkaa olaanaa irra akka jirtu mirkaneessiteetti.

title: Photos: Spain beat Argentina to win second World Cup title
english: Spain secured their second World Cup title by defeating Argentina 1-0 in a tense final held in New Jersey. The decisive goal was scored by Ferran Torres during extra time, shortly after Argentina was reduced to ten players following Enzo Fernandez's red card. Despite a strong defensive effort by Argentina, Spain’s superior performance and tactical control allowed them to claim the trophy.
amharic: ስፔን በአሜሪካ በተካሄደው የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ አርጀንቲናን 1-0 በማሸነፍ ሁለተኛውን ዋንጫ ማንሳት ችላለች። የጨዋታው ብቸኛ ግብ በጭማሪ ሰዓት በፌራን ቶሬስ የተቆጠረች ሲሆን፣ አርጀንቲና በኢንዞ ፈርናንዴዝ የቀይ ካርድ ምክንያት በሜዳ ላይ አስር ተጫዋቾች ብቻ ቀርተው ነበር። ምንም እንኳን አርጀንቲና ጠንካራ የመከላከል ብቃት ብታሳይም፣ ስፔን የላቀ የጨዋታ ብቃት በማሳየት የዓለም ዋንጫውን ማሸነፍ ችላለች።
oromo: Ispeeniin tapha xumuraa Waancaa Addunyaa Niiw Jarsii irratti geggeeffame irratti Arjantiinaa 1-0 injifachuun waancaa isaanii lammaffaa fudhataniiru. Galchiin murteessaan kun yeroo dabalataa irratti Ferraan Tooresiin kan galfame yoo ta'u, kana dura taphataan Arjantiinaa Enzoo Fernaandez kaardii diimaa argatee ergame ture. Arjantiinaan ittisa cimaa godhuu kan yaalte ta'us, ispeeniin tapha isaanii irratti aangoo qabaachuu fi dandeettii olaanaa agarsiisuun injifannoo argachuu danda'aniiru.

title: Food delivery rider wins China's top literary prize
english: Wang Jibing, a 56-year-old food delivery rider in China, has won the prestigious Lu Xun Literary Prize for his poetry collection titled Low Flight. Drawing inspiration from his daily experiences and interviews with fellow workers, his writing sheds light on the realities of the gig economy. Despite this major achievement, Wang remains humble and intends to continue his delivery work, maintaining his down-to-earth lifestyle.
amharic: በቻይና የቤት ለቤት ምግብ አድራሽ የሆኑት የ56 ዓመቱ ዋንግ ጂቢንግ፣ 'ሎው ፍላይት' በተሰኘው የግጥም ስብስባቸው ከፍተኛውን የሉ ሹን የሥነ-ጽሑፍ ሽልማት አሸንፈዋል። ግጥሞቻቸው በዕለት ተዕለት የሥራ ልምዳቸው እና ከሌሎች ሠራተኞች ጋር ባደረጓቸው ቃለ መጠይቆች ላይ የተመሠረቱ ሲሆን፣ የዘመናዊው የጊግ ኢኮኖሚ ተግዳሮቶችን በግልጽ ያሳያሉ። ይህ ትልቅ ክብር ቢሰጣቸውም፣ ዋንግ አሁንም የሥራ ህይወታቸውን ለመቀጠል እና ቀላል ኑሯቸውን ለመምራት መርጠዋል።
oromo: Chaayinaa keessatti namni nyaata geejjibsiisu Wang Jibing jedhamu, walaloo isaa 'Low Flight' jedhamuun badhaasa ogbarruu guddaa Lu Xun jedhamu injifateera. Walaloon isaa kun muuxannoo isaa guyyuu fi hojjettoota biroo waliin marii godhe irratti kan hundaa'e yoo ta'u, rakkoo hojiiwwan yeroo ammaa keessa jiru ifa baasa. Badhaasicha argatus, Wang akkaataa jireenya isaa isa salphaa fi hojii geejjibsiisuu isaa itti fufuuf murteesseera.

title: Protests continue in Houston over ICE killing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo
english: Hundreds of protesters in Houston marched to demand justice following the fatal shooting of 52-year-old Mexican national Lorenzo Salgado Araujo by an ICE agent. While authorities claimed the officer acted in self-defense, witnesses have disputed this account, and government statements have not confirmed the official narrative. The incident has intensified public anger over US immigration enforcement tactics, leading to calls for further demonstrations and systemic investigations.
amharic: በሂዩስተን ከተማ በኢሚግሬሽን እና ጉምሩክ ባለስልጣን (ICE) ወኪል የተገደለውን የ52 ዓመት የሜክሲኮ ዜጋ ሎሬንዞ ሳልጋዶ አራውጆን ፍትህ በመጠየቅ በመቶዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰልፈኞች ተቃውሞ አሰምተዋል። ባለስልጣናት ግድያው የተፈጸመው ራሱን ለመከላከል በሚል ቢናገሩም፣ የአይን እማኞች ግን የዚህን አባባል ተቃርነዋል። ይህ ክስተት በስደተኞች ላይ የሚደረገውን ጥብቅ አያያዝ በመቃወም በከተማዋ ሰፊ ተቃውሞዎችን አስነስቷል።
oromo: Hundeedda namoota magaalaa Hiyustonitti walgahaniin, lammii Meksikoo umrii 52 kan ta'an Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, jala bultii jila ICE tiin ajjeefamuun isaanii mormanii jiru. Mootummaan ajjeechaan kun of-irraa ittisuuf kan raawwatame yoo jedhu, ragaan argan garuu yaada kana mormuudhaan shakkiin akka jiru ibsan. Gochi kun siyaasa godaantota irratti fudhatamu kan morman namoota hedduu biratti aarii guddaa kan uume yoo ta'u, mormiinis itti fufee jira.

title: Trump: Latest strikes on Iran ‘in honour’ of killed US military personnel
english: President Donald Trump confirmed that the US has continued military strikes against Iran for nine straight days. These operations are intended as a tribute to the American troops who lost their lives in Iraq and Jordan. Since the start of the conflict, 17 US service members have been killed and over 420 have sustained injuries.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ ለዘጠኝ ተከታታይ ቀናት ወታደራዊ ጥቃቶችን ማድረሷን አረጋግጠዋል። እነዚህ ጥቃቶች በኢራቅ እና በዮርዳኖስ ሕይወታቸው ላለፈው የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች መታሰቢያ እንደሆኑ ተገልጿል። የግጭቱ መጀመሪያ አንስቶ እስካሁን ድረስ 17 የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ሲገደሉ ከ420 በላይ የሚሆኑት ደግሞ ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል።
oromo: Pireezidaant Doolaard Traamp tarkaanfiin waraanaa Ameerikaan Iraan irratti guyyoota sagal walitti aansuun fudhatte, loltoota Ameerikaa Iraaq fi Yordaanos keessatti du'aniif kabaja argisiisuuf akka ta'e ibsaniiru. Waraanni kun eegalamee kaasee, loltoonni Ameerikaa 17 ta'an ajjeefamanii, namoonni 420 ol ta'an ammoo miidhaan irra ga'eera.

title: US releases footage of ninth consecutive night of strikes on Iran
english: The United States military has conducted airstrikes against Iranian targets for the ninth night in a row. According to CENTCOM, these operations focused on destroying air defense systems, command centers, and missile launch sites. The campaign also targeted surveillance and communication networks to weaken Iran's maritime and military capabilities.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል በኢራን ላይ ለተከታታይ ዘጠነኛው ምሽት የአየር ድብደባ ፈጽሟል። የአሜሪካ ማዕከላዊ ዕዝ (CENTCOM) እንደገለጸው፣ ጥቃቱ የኢራንን የአየር መከላከያ ሥርዓቶች፣ ወታደራዊ የትእዛዝ ማዕከላት እና የሚሳኤል ማስወንጨፊያ ጣቢያዎችን ኢላማ ያደረገ ነበር። በተጨማሪም የኢራንን የባህር ኃይል እና የኮሙዩኒኬሽን አቅም ለማዳከም የታቀዱ ተግባራት ተካሂደዋል።
oromo: Humnoonni waraana Ameerikaa halkanii halkan tattaaffii saglan dura eegalameef Iran irratti haleellaa qilleensa irraa gaggeessaa jiru. Akka gabaasa CENTCOM-tti, haleellaan kun buufata ajajaa, sirnoota ittisa qilleensaa fi iddoowwan meeshaalee waraanaa Iran caccabsuu irratti xiyyeeffateera. Tarkaanfiin kun dandeettii waraana galaanaa fi quunnamtii Iran laaffisuuf kan yaadame dha.

title: Tearful Scaloni uncertain of Argentina future after World Cup loss
english: Following Argentina's loss to Spain in the 2026 World Cup final, head coach Lionel Scaloni expressed uncertainty regarding his future with the team. Although he remains the country's most successful manager, he feels it may be time to step aside as he doubts he can replicate such high-level achievements with a new squad. Scaloni plans to discuss his situation with the federation president after his contract concludes in December.
amharic: እ.ኤ.አ. በ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ አርጀንቲና በስፔን ከተሸነፈች በኋላ የቡድኑ ዋና አሰልጣኝ ሊዮኔል ስካሎኒ ስለወደፊት ቆይታቸው እርግጠኛ እንዳልሆኑ ተናግረዋል። ስካሎኒ በአርጀንቲና ታሪክ ከተሳካላቸው አሰልጣኞች አንዱ ቢሆኑም፣ አዲስ ቡድን በመገንባት እንደቀድሞው ውጤታማ መሆን ስለማይችሉ ስራቸውን ሊለቁ እንደሚችሉ ጠቁመዋል። አሰልጣኙ ኮንትራታቸው በታህሳስ ወር ሲጠናቀቅ ከእግር ኳስ ፌዴሬሽን ፕሬዝዳንት ጋር በመመካከር የመጨረሻ ውሳኔ ላይ እንደሚደርሱ ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Injifannoo xumuraa waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 irratti Ispeen Arjantiinarratti erga galte booda, leenjisaan garee biyyaalessaa Arjantiinaa Lionel Iskaalonii gara fuulduraa isaanii irratti shakkiin akka jiru ibsan. Iskaaloniin leenjisaa biyyattii milkaa'aa ta'an ta'us, garee haarawa ijaaruun injifannoo kanaan dura argame irra deebi'uun akka ulfaatu waan itti dhaga'ameef, hojii isaanii gadhiisuuf yaada qabu. Iskaaloniin kantaraktiin isaanii Muddeetti erga dhumee booda, pirezidaantii federeeshinichaa waliin mari'atanii murtoo dhumaa akka kennan beeksisaniiru.

title: Women’s tennis players must take one-time gene test for eligibility
english: The Women’s Tennis Association has updated its eligibility rules to require all female players to undergo a one-time genetic screening for the SRY gene. This test, which identifies biological sex through a blood or swab sample, replaces the previous policy that focused on testosterone levels. The new mandate aims to standardize entry requirements for professional tournaments starting this year while emphasizing athlete privacy and dignity.
amharic: የሴቶች የቴኒስ ማህበር በሁሉም የቴኒስ ተጫዋቾች ላይ አንድ ጊዜ ብቻ የሚደረግ የዘረመል ምርመራ እንደሚተገበር አስታውቋል። የኤስ.አር.ዋይ (SRY) ጂን ምርመራ በመባል የሚታወቀው ይህ ሂደት የባዮሎጂካል ጾታን ለመለየት በደም ወይም በአፍ ምራቅ ናሙና አማካይነት ይከናወናል። አዲሱ ደንብ ቀደም ሲል የነበረውን የቴስቶስትሮን መጠን የመቆጣጠር መመሪያ በመተካት፣ በዘንድሮው የውድድር ዓመት ተግባራዊ ይሆናል።
oromo: Waldaan Teneesii Dubartootaa (WTA) taphattoonni hundi qormaata jeeneetiksii al tokko qofa ta'e akka fudhatan haala mijeesseera. Qormaanni kun jeeniin SRY jedhamu qaama taphattootaa keessa jiraachuu fi dhabachuu isaa qorachuun saala bioloojiitiin mirkaneessa. Qajeelfamni haaraan kun kan duraan turesse hormoonii qaamaa irratti hundaa'uun taphachuun walqabatu bakka bu'uun, bara kana irraa eegalee dirqama ta'ee hojiirra oola.

title: Bahrain intercepting attacks from Iran
english: Bahrain has activated its air defense systems to counter incoming attacks linked to Iran. Residents in the capital, Manama, reported hearing explosions as warning sirens sounded across the country. Official state media confirmed that the military is actively responding to these hostilities.
amharic: የባህሬን አየር መከላከያ ስርዓቶች ከኢራን የተሰነዘሩ ጥቃቶችን ለመመከት እንዲነቁ ተደርገዋል። በዋና ከተማዋ ማናማ የፍንዳታ ድምፆች መሰማታቸውን ተከትሎ የማስጠንቀቂያ ደወሎች ተሰምተዋል። የመንግስት መገናኛ ብዙሃን የሀገሪቱ ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች ለጥቃቱ ምላሽ እየሰጡ መሆናቸውን አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Bahrainiin weerara Iran irraa ishee irra ga'u ittisuuf sirna ittisa qilleensa ishee hojiirra oolchiteetti. Magaalaa guddittii Maanaamaa keessatti sagaleen dhoohinsaafi sagaleen akeekkachiisaa dhaga'amuu gabaafameera. Miidiyaan mootummaa akka mirkaneessetti, waraanni biyyattii haleellaa kana ittisuuf tarkaanfii fudhachaa jira.

title: Morning update
english: The United States conducted its ninth consecutive night of airstrikes against Iranian military targets in response to the deaths of American service members. Meanwhile, Iran's Revolutionary Guard announced retaliatory attacks in Syria and threats against oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, while a ship fire was reported near Oman. Additionally, tensions in the region remain high following reports that Israeli forces killed two Palestinians in the West Bank.
amharic: አሜሪካ የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች መገደልን ተከትሎ ለተከታታይ ዘጠነኛ ሌሊት በአይራን ወታደራዊ ኢላማዎች ላይ የአየር ድብደባ አድርሳለች። በሌላ በኩል የአይራን አብዮታዊ ዘበኛ በሶሪያ የመልስ ጥቃት እንደፈጸመ እና በሆርሙዝ ስትሬት የነዳጅ ማመላለሻ መርከቦች ላይ ማስፈራሪያ እንዳደረሰ አስታውቋል። በአሁኑ ወቅት በዌስት ባንክ የእስራኤል ኃይሎች በፈጸሙት ጥቃት ሁለት ፍልስጤማውያን መገደላቸውን ተከትሎ በክልሉ ያለው የጸጥታ ውጥረት ተባብሷል።
oromo: Amerikaa du'a loltoota ishee hordofee, halkan saglaffaadhaaf iddoowwan waraana Iraan irratti haleellaa qilleensa irraa raawwatteetti. Gama biraatiin, waardiyan qabsoo Iraan mootummaa Siiriyaa keessatti haleellaa haaloo ba'uu raawwachuu fi karaa galaana Hormuz keessa kan darban dooniiwwan boba'aa irratti doorsisa gochuu ishee beeksifteetti. Kana malees, weeraraan humnoota Israa'el naannoo West Bank keessatti namoota Falasxiin lama ajjeesuu hordofee walitti bu'iinsi naannichaa caalaatti hammaachaa jira.

title: Blasts heard in Bahrain's Manama
english: Residents in Manama, the capital of Bahrain, reported hearing multiple explosions. These sounds occurred immediately after emergency warning sirens began to sound throughout the city. Authorities are currently looking into the cause of the incident.
amharic: የባህሬን ዋና ከተማ በሆነችው ማናማ ውስጥ በርካታ ፍንዳታዎች እንደተሰሙ ተዘግቧል። ድምጾቹ የተሰሙት ከተማዋ ውስጥ የአደጋ ጊዜ ማስጠንቀቂያ ሳይረኖች ከጠሩ በኋላ ወዲያውኑ ነው። የባለስልጣናት አካላት በጉዳዩ ላይ ምርመራ እያደረጉ ነው።
oromo: Magaalaa guddoo Baahireyn kan taate Manaamaa keessatti sagaleen dhukaatii hedduu dhaga'ameera. Sagaleen kun kan dhaga'ame erga sireeniin akeekkachiisaa magaalaatti dhaga'amuu eegalee booda ture. Qaamni dhimmi ilaallatu waa'ee dhimmichaa qorannaa taasisaa jira.

title: Kuwaiti air defences responding to Iranian attacks for a second time
english: Kuwait's military has activated its air defense systems for the second time today to counter incoming attacks from Iran. Officials confirmed that loud noises heard by residents are due to defensive interceptions of hostile objects. The army has advised the public to remain calm and follow all official safety guidelines.
amharic: የኩዌት ወታደራዊ ኃይል ከአየር ላይ የሚሰነዘሩ ጥቃቶችን ለመከላከል የአየር መከላከያ ስርዓቱን ለሁለተኛ ጊዜ አግብሯል። ባለስልጣናት እንደገለፁት የሚሰሙት ፍንዳታዎች የጠላት ኢላማዎችን በመከላከል ሂደት የሚከሰቱ ናቸው። የኩዌት ጦር ህዝቡ ደህንነትን እንዲጠብቅ እና የፀጥታ አካላትን መመሪያ እንዲከተል አሳስቧል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyya Kuweet haleellaa Iran irraa isaan irra ga'u ittisuuf sirna ittisa qilleensaa isaanii yeroo lammaffaaf hojii irra oolchaniiru. Namoonni sagalee dhukaatii dhaga'an kun kan ta'e meeshaalee diinaa qilleensa irra turan ittisuuf jecha akka ta'e aanga'oonni mirkaneessaniiru. Waraanni biyyattii ummanni nagaa isaa akka eeggatu fi qajeelfamoota nageenyaa hordofuuf gorsa kenneera.

title: Iran claims attacks on Kuwait
english: Iran's Revolutionary Guard has announced that it launched drone strikes against American military facilities located at the Ali Al Salem base in Kuwait. According to the report, the attacks resulted in the destruction of a radar system and caused significant fires that damaged drone hangars and aviation supplies. This action represents a direct escalation by Iranian forces against US military infrastructure in the region.
amharic: የኢራን እስላማዊ አብዮታዊ ዘብ በኩዌት በሚገኘው የአሊ አል ሳሌም የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ጣቢያ ላይ በድሮን ጥቃት መፈጸሙን አስታውቋል። በደረሰው ጥቃት የአሜሪካ የራዳር ስርዓት ሙሉ በሙሉ መውደሙን እና የድሮን ማከማቻ ስፍራዎች በእሳት መጎዳታቸውን ተገልጿል። ይህ ክስተት በክልሉ ውስጥ ባሉ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ የኢራን ኃይሎች የወሰዱት ከባድ እርምጃ ተደርጎ ተወስዷል።
oromo: Humnoonni jacha Irraan (IRGC) buufata waraana Ameerikaa kan Kuweetitti argamu, Ali Al Salem irratti haleellaa xiyyaara maleeyyii (drone) gaggeessuu isaanii beeksisaniiru. Haleellaa kanaan radarri waraana Ameerikaa guutummaatti kan barbadaa'e yoo ta'u, bakka xiyyaarri maleeyyii itti kuufamanis miidhaan guddaan irra ga'eera. Gochi kun humnoonni Irraan buufataalee waraana Ameerikaa naannichatti argaman irratti tarkaanfii cimaa fudhachuu isaanii kan agarsiisuudha.

title: How a young and cohesive Spain took down Lionel Messi’s Argentina
english: Spain captured their second World Cup title by defeating Argentina in a dominant final performance held in New Jersey. Led by a talented, youthful squad, the Spanish team remained undefeated throughout the entire tournament while conceding only a single goal. Their victory marked a remarkable turnaround after a shaky start to the competition, showcasing their growth and defensive strength under coach Luis de la Fuente.
amharic: ስፔን በአርጀንቲና ላይ በኒው ጀርሲ በተደረገው የፍፃሜ ጨዋታ ድል በመቀዳጀት ሁለተኛውን የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸንፋለች። በወጣት እና በታላቅ ተሰጥኦ ባላቸው ተጫዋቾች የተገነባው የስፔን ብሔራዊ ቡድን፣ በውድድሩ በሙሉ ሳይሸነፍ አንድ ግብ ብቻ በመቀበል አመርቂ ብቃት አሳይቷል። በውድድሩ መጀመሪያ ላይ የነበረውን አቋም በማሻሻል፣ በአሰልጣኝ ሉዊስ ደ ላ ፈንቴ መሪነት ጠንካራ የመከላከል አቅም በማሳየት የዋንጫው ባለቤት መሆን ችለዋል።
oromo: Ispeeniin Arjentiinaa injifachuun xumura tapha Waancaa Addunyaa Niiw Jarsii irratti taasifame irratti injifannoo argachuun waancaa isa lammaffaa fudhatteetti. Gareen dargaggootaa fi ogummaa olaanaa qabu kun, taphoota hunda keessatti osoo hin injifamin fi goolii tokko qofa erga seensifatee booda moohannoo argateera. Ispeeniin jalqaba taphichaa irratti qormaata ishee mudate mo’uun, leenjisaa Luwiis de la Fuentee jalatti tapha ittisaa cimaa fi sirrii ta’een injifannoo seena qabeessa galmeessiteetti.

title: Andy Burnham to become UK’s PM on Monday: What happens next?
english: Andy Burnham is set to become the 59th Prime Minister of the UK this coming Monday, following the resignation of Keir Starmer. Known as the 'King of the North' from his time as mayor of Greater Manchester, he will formally accept an invitation from King Charles III to form a new government. He faces immediate challenges including high living costs and a slow economy as he transitions back into national leadership.
amharic: ኬይር ስታርመር ከሥልጣን በመልቀቃቸው ምክንያት አንዲ በርንሃም በሚቀጥለው ሰኞ የዩናይትድ ኪንግደም 59ኛው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሆነው ይሾማሉ። የቀድሞው የማንቸስተር ከንቲባ የነበሩት በርንሃም፣ ንጉሥ ቻርለስን በመገናኘት አዲስ መንግሥት እንዲመሠርቱ በይፋ ይጠየቃሉ። የሀገሪቱን የኢኮኖሚ ቀውስ እና የኑሮ ውድነትን መፍታት የአዲሱ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ዋና ተግዳሮቶች ይሆናሉ።
